programme.desc: The man who stood Dorothy up for her senior prom contacts her and they make a date. After learning why he stood her up, Dorothy unleashes her wrath on the person at fault, Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love for Sale
programme.desc: The girls prepare for the Children's Hospital Bachelorette Auction and a reluctant Dorothy decides to participate. She is in for a quick surprise when Stan walks in and begins bidding.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: The deathbed confession of an ex-patient at Shady Pines means bad news for Sophia, since in her confession she stated that she and Sophia started the 1985 Shady Pines fire.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: Sophia can't remember the events of the evening of the 1985 Shady Pines fire and decides to jump bail and go back to Sicily. With the threat of Sophia going to jail, the girls reminisce about good times they have spent together.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Guests include actor James Denton from the Hallmark Channel series, 'Good Witch' and 'Duck Dynasty' star Missy Robertson. Lifestyle expert Monica Hart cooks grilled shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: A woman is doing everything she can to save her cupcake business. With the help of a handsome investment banker, her luck begins to turn around.

programme.title: Movie: Pearl in Paradise
programme.desc: Alex, a photographer for a travel magazine, and Colin, a best-selling author, team up to find an elusive Fijian pearl.

programme.title: Movie: My Summer Prince
programme.desc: When a prince finds himself in some hot water for his partying ways, the royal family hires a PR consultant. But when she falls ill, her assistant steps in to take control of the campaign and possibly the prince's heart.

programme.title: The Office: Double Date
programme.desc: Jim and Pam have no choice but to go out with Michael and Helene, as their excuses have dried up. Dwight does nice things for the people in the office.

programme.title: The Office: Murder
programme.desc: Michael is troubled by rumours about Dunder Mifflin, and forces the office into a day of strange diversions. Andy figures out that the chief obstacle he has to overcome is his own awkwardness.

programme.title: The Office: Share Holders Meeting
programme.desc: When Michael learns he is going to be honoured at the Dunder Mifflin shareholder meeting in New York City, he brings Andy, Dwight and Oscar with him. Jim is left in charge of the office, and has a hard time getting Ryan to do any work.

programme.title: The Office: Scott's Tots
programme.desc: Michael has to face the music when he realizes he cannot keep a promise he made to a group of kids 10 years earlier.

programme.title: The Office: The Banker
programme.desc: When a potential buyer comes to Dunder Mifflin, Michael, Dwight, Andy and Pam pull out all the stops in the hopes of impressing him with their high profile contacts. Michael reminisces about all the great times they have had in the office.

programme.title: The Office: Sabre
programme.desc: When Sabre comes in to take over Dunder Mifflin, Michael struggles to accept the new policies. Pam and Jim have an interview at the daycare they are hoping to get accepted into.

programme.title: The Office: The Manager and the Salesman
programme.desc: Sabre's CEO visits and tells Michael and Jim that one of them must take a step down and go back to sales.

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam's contractions begin but she and Jim are determined to wait it out as long as possible so they can have more time at the hospital. The office tries to distract Pam from the pain by entertaining her.

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam and Jim make a blunder after their baby's birth; Michael sets up Erin with Kevin.

programme.title: The Office: New Leads
programme.desc: When the sales staff lets Sabre's new 'sales is king' policy get to their heads, Michael hides their new, prized leads.

programme.title: The Office: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Michael gets kicked out of a bar while trying to impress one of Jim's friends.

programme.title: The Office: Secretary's Day
programme.desc: Andy pulls out all the stops to give Erin a memorable Secretary's Day, and Michael reluctantly agrees to take her out to lunch. While out, Michael accidentally reveals a secret about Andy and Angela's relationship.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: Hundreds of people vanished without a trace in the mid 1970s, leaving their families was distraught and wondering about them for decades. In March 1997, shocking news of a mysterious religious group made world headlines.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: What Killed Heath Ledger?
programme.desc: Whether Heath Ledger's immersion into the role of 'The Joker' impacted his personal life and strange drawings and clues found in his apartment are investigated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Texas

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Romania
programme.desc: Bear encounters steep ravines, cavernous underground water systems and comes face to face with a large adult brown bear.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Welcome to Treasure Island

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Nazi Toxic Hell Sub

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Curse of the Kraken

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures
programme.desc: The treasures of Ramses II are found at Abu Simbel, a giant temple carved into a desert cliff over 3,000 years ago, and new discoveries at this marvel reveal the secrets of ancient Egypt's greatest pharaoh.

programme.title: Unearthed: Wrath of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: New evidence reveals if Attila the Hun was responsible for the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Cursed Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's strange bent pyramid is one of the world's most mysterious ancient mega-structures, and new discoveries help experts investigate its dark secret: if it was always intended to look so bizarre, or if something went catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Forbidden City
programme.desc: For the first time, archaeologists use cutting-edge technology to discover what lies beneath China's Forbidden City, revealing the dark secrets of this mysterious mega-palace that have remained buried for nearly 600 years.

programme.title: Unearthed: Titanic: The Last Secrets
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into the sinking of the Titanic reveals new discoveries that might finally explain the mysteries of her last moments, and experts get closer to a shocking secret: if there was a way to save almost everyone on board.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Easter Island
programme.desc: The mysterious statues of Easter Island were built by one of the world's strangest and most isolated civilizations, and today, new evidence reveals why they were built and what caused Easter Island's sudden downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Shift Happens
programme.desc: As the miners look to find more valuable ground, Shawn must fight the sea's shifting tide, Ken strains his excavator arm when digging hard cobble, Kris tries his chances with a rookie diver, and new diver Brian saves Vernon's day.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Lee Nose Best!
programme.desc: Tony has large growths on his nose that impair his breathing. Kevin has a bump in his jawline that is a 'lady deterrent.' Marie has an unsightly lump on her forehead that makes her a hermit. Tommy's leg bump makes it difficult for him to work.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Hips Don't Lie

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Panty Raid
programme.desc: The guys massage beachgoers on the boardwalk, broadcast the news from Times Square, and get their kicks teaching a karate class.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Truth Hurts

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 4

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug

programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Lord and His Lady

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Stacking the Deck

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Blast From The Past
programme.desc: Bobby Flay is haunted when Food Network's Amanda Freitag and Katie Lee bring two ghosts from his past to the arena.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Green, White and Red
programme.desc: Little Italy is in the house when Naples-born Raffaele Ronca goes up against Italian expert Ken Vedrinski. Food Network veterans Anne Burrell and Scott Conant bring their expertise to the arena to get Bobby Flay beat.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: We're All Family Here
programme.desc: Sophie Flay enlists the help of Alton Brown to surprise her father. Jonathan Waxman and Dean Fearing enter the arena to face their protégé Bobby Flay one last time.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Number One Baby
programme.desc: Food Network's Scott Conant and Cooking Channel's Laura Vitale are bringing their Italian flare to crush Bobby Flay's record. It's up to San Diego chef Nicolas Bour and Charleston, South Carolina's RJ Moody to make sure they are number one in the kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Clamming Up
programme.desc: Indian spice master Kiran Patnam and creative chef Jonathan Wu bring big city energy to the arena. It's up to Chopped judges Amanda Freitag and Geoffrey Zakarian to decide which contender has what it takes to slay the Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Grill Me
programme.desc: "Beach Bites'" Katie Lee and actor Mekhi Phifer grill Louisiana's Chef Nathan Gresham and Arizona's Chef Lisa Dahl to determine who can smoke Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Gives You Goosebumps
programme.desc: The star ingredient gives everyone goosebumps, including Chopper’s Scott Conant and comedic actress Cheri Oteri. Texas chef Nick Walker and Bosnian chef Senada Grbic hope to return the favor to Bobby Flay with a win in the second round.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Stuffed With Victory
programme.desc: Geoffrey Zakarian and TV host Sara Haines have a lot to be thankful for at the table this year, and they've brought in Creole Chef Bernard Carmouche and meatball master Daniel Sharp to stuff Bobby Flay like a turkey.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Revisited: Out of Date But Not Out of Time
programme.desc: Robert Irvine returns to Paterson, N.J., to check on one of his most-unique renovations, Paul's Bar and Bowling. When Robert first visited Paul's in 2014, the family business hadn't been updated in decades.

programme.title: Summer Rush: Travers Stakes Week
programme.desc: The Travers Stakes horse race in nearby Saratoga Springs attracts thousands of horse-racing fans to the Lake George area. Complications with Buddy and Jen Foy's costly renovation at the Chateau on the Lake put their Travers Stakes party in jeopardy.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Oh Brother
programme.desc: It's a case of sibling rivalry as brothers and chefs Steve and Brian Redzikowski go head-to-head for the chance to take down Bobby Flay. Olympic skier Gus Kenworthy and Chopped's Alex Guarnaschelli decide which brother is the chosen one to face Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Skating By
programme.desc: Las Vegas chef Nicole Brisson rolls the dice against Chef Adam Greenberg for the chance to beat the house. It's up to "Worst Cooks in America's" Anne Burrell and TV host Jaymee Sire to play their cards and choose a contender.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Revisited: Out of Date But Not Out of Time
programme.desc: Robert Irvine returns to Paterson, N.J., to check on one of his most-unique renovations, Paul's Bar and Bowling. When Robert first visited Paul's in 2014, the family business hadn't been updated in decades.

programme.desc: The Cornelia Marie hatches a scheme to watch the Seahawks play. An injured crewman jeopardizes Captain Keith Colburn's plan on the Wizard. The Cape Caution crew makes a near fatal error. The Time Bandit loses a Captain.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: I'm the Captain
programme.desc: The polar ice pack descends, threatening the end of season. Jake struggles to lead his crew in the worst of conditions. Sig attempts to offload his crab before saving his gear. Casey shows Josh what it means to be a Captain and Keith grinds to the finish.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: We Have Not Yet Begun to Fight
programme.desc: Polar ice descends and each Skipper must choose flight or fight. The Saga is in danger of sinking and Jake must act fast to save his crew. Josh takes a huge gamble against Casey's wishes and heads towards the ice. Sig and Johnathan race to rescue gear.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Five-Year Storm, Part 1
programme.desc: The most menacing storm of opilio season moves in on the fleet. A rogue wave terrorizes the Cape Caution, ripping steel and timber. The Wizard crew races to plug a gushing leak. The Saga, captained by Jake Anderson, is nearly capsized by a 40-foot wave.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Five-Year Storm, Part 2
programme.desc: A 600-mile-wide arctic storm continues to ravage the fleet. Rookie skippers Jake Anderson and Josh Harris struggle just keep their heads above water while veteran captains Andy Hillstrand and Sig Hansen charge straight into the heart of the tempest.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: We Have Not Yet Begun to Fight
programme.desc: Polar ice descends and each Skipper must choose flight or fight. The Saga is in danger of sinking and Jake must act fast to save his crew. Josh takes a huge gamble against Casey's wishes and heads towards the ice. Sig and Johnathan race to rescue gear.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Beastmode
programme.desc: The Cornelia Marie hatches a scheme to watch the Seahawks play. An injured crewman jeopardizes Captain Keith Colburn's plan on the Wizard. The Cape Caution crew makes a near fatal error. The Time Bandit loses a Captain.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: I'm the Captain
programme.desc: The polar ice pack descends, threatening the end of season. Jake struggles to lead his crew in the worst of conditions. Sig attempts to offload his crab before saving his gear. Casey shows Josh what it means to be a Captain and Keith grinds to the finish.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Aliens of the Outback
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson explores some of Australia's alien-looking lizard species and learns about their bizarre features - evolutionary adaptations to the harsh outback. Then, the team is hot on the trail of the elusive spike-covered Thorny devil.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: To Catch a Monitor
programme.desc: Coyote and his crew venture through the Outback in search of two iconic monitor species. As he swims through the watery oasis, he strategically stalks the Marten’s water monitor in hopes of having a face-to-face encounter.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Night of the River Monsters
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson braves the winding rivers of Maleny, Australia, in search of a real river monster: the elusive and massive long-finned eel. Coyote also encounters a smiling Saw Shelled Turtle and gets a painful, bloody kiss from a Carpet Python.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Swarmed by Killer Bees
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson's dangerous past encounter with honey bees has lead him to join forces with bee conservationist, Chris Brinton. A stunt involving Peterson and 10,000 bees dispels misconceptions and reveals their passive nature.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Legendary Turtle of Texas
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to the swamplands of Texas in search of a giant alligator snapping turtle known as Raphael. Coyote is determined to prove that this turtle is the largest living creature of his kind.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Danube
programme.desc: The Danube's scenic route through ten European countries has made it a tourist magnet. Poachers, invasive species and engineering projects have made it one of the most endangered rivers on Earth. Jeremy investigates what can be done to save it.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Yangtze
programme.desc: China's Yangtze River is threatened by overfishing, industrial pollution and the loss of iconic monster fish. Jeremy journeys upstream to find out if there are any fish left, and meets the heroes fighting for the future of the river.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Zambezi
programme.desc: Wild and unnavigable, Africa's Zambezi boasts the world's mightiest waterfall, heart-pounding rapids and man-eating crocs. From the upper reaches in Zambia to the delta in Mozambique, Jeremy investigates the threats to this mighty river.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Ganges
programme.desc: India's mighty Ganges, a river revered by a billion Hindus as a living goddess, is in trouble. Jeremy Wade is on a 1,500-mile mission to investigate the problems first hand and discover what is being done to save this holy river.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Amazon
programme.desc: The Amazon is the mightiest of all the rivers, but it is also under immense pressure. Jeremy Wade traces the epic migration of the dorado catfish and discovers the issues putting this great river at risk from leaking pipelines to impassable dams.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Mississippi
programme.desc: The mighty Mississippi is threatened on several fronts: from alien invaders pushing out iconic native fish, to vast blooms of green algae strangling life from the river. Jeremy meets scientists, fishermen and leaders fighting to save the river.

programme.title: River Monsters: European Man-eater
programme.desc: The Wels Catfish is an aggressive predator of man-eating proportions.

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Flesh Eaters
programme.desc: Wade seeks the notorious flesh eaters of the Amazon, including a fish that can swallow a man whole.

programme.desc: An adventurous Colorado couple has spent the last few years flipping houses so they can buy a tropical sanctuary in the beautiful Bahamas. Now, they're ready to find a home near Exuma's beautiful blue waters and secluded beaches.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: A Higher Calling
programme.desc: A Canadian couple fell in love with the Bahamas, the people and culture during his appointment at a church in Nassau.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: This Is Not Los Angeles
programme.desc: A London-born woman searches for a private sanctuary away from her busy life in Los Angeles on Eleuthera.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Time to Hang Ten
programme.desc: Canadians Jason and Melissa love to wax their boards and ride the waves, but Calgary isn't much of a surfing mecca. So they're looking for a home on the island of Eleuthera, one of the top surfing spots in the Bahamas.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Newfound Freedom
programme.desc: A woman who discovered the Bahamas recently retired from counterintelligence, is newly single, and ready to start a new chapter and find a home that matches her newfound sense of freedom.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: From Traffic to Tranquility
programme.desc: A firefighter and his wife are looking for a Bahamian getaway on Long Island where they can escape the relentless traffic in Los Angeles. She has her heart set on a relaxing retreat, but he and the kids want to be close to the action and adventure.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Turning a Picture into Reality
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania couple who've been staring at a picture of a beach house on their fridge for years decide to take a leap and make that picture their reality.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Something's Gotta Give
programme.desc: A Florida couple is looking for a family retreat on the tranquil Berry Islands. While he would love a place on the marina, she prefers a million-dollar view on the beach. However, they agree that they need enough space to accommodate their growing family.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: All In
programme.desc: A Floridian couple decides to sell everything and move to Exuma. Having built and sold a successful tourism business, these outdoor enthusiasts are ready for their next adventure.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: An Exuma High
programme.desc: A husband and wife fell in love with the incredible waters that surround Exuma and knew it would be the perfect spot for their dream vacation home.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Up From Down Under
programme.desc: An Australian environmentalist looks for a retreat on the island of Eleuthera to escape her high-pressure job. The island is an easy sell with its breathtaking beaches and unspoiled beauty, but finding her ideal home isn't as simple.

programme.title: Renovation Island: Paradise Found
programme.desc: Bryan and Sarah Baeumler, plus their four kids, travel to the Bahamas to begin the renovation of a fifty-year-old beachfront hotel. During demolition, the crew finds major termite damage.

programme.title: Renovation Island: The Deep End
programme.desc: Demolition begins in the honeymoon suite and pool. The crew uncovers decrepit plumbing in the hotel block, putting stress on the build's schedule and budget. The Baeumlers reveal the completion of the resort's pool.

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Naked and Not Afraid
programme.desc: Toya shocks the ladies with her idea of an art class. Heavenly decides not to tell Damon about Toya's explicit birthday party. While Simone and Cecil give the boys a safe sex talk, Jackie does some sexual research for an exciting new project.

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Girl Code, Interrupted
programme.desc: Hoping to get the ladies' friendships back on track, Jackie invites the group to Savannah for a good old-fashioned girls' trip. Feeling called out by Damon, Heavenly takes it out on Toya.

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Showdown in Savannah
programme.desc: Any progress made during revival weekend in Savannah comes to a screeching halt after Mariah's meltdown on the bus. Dr. Jackie reaches her breaking point when she realizes that there are some problems she just can't fix.

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Food For Thought
programme.desc: Jackie butts heads with Curtis over the rising costs of their home renovations. Contessa gives her dad a new smile courtesy of Dr. Heavenly. Simone and Cecil give Miles a wake-up call about his future. Quad celebrates her birthday.

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Contessa's Carnival
programme.desc: Quad loses her mind when she allows Heavenly to set her up on a blind date. Dr. Jackie piles on her to-do list by renovating a new office. An overwhelmed Contessa throws a huge carnival birthday for her kids, hoping to make up for her mommy guilt.

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Battle Down South
programme.desc: Toya and Eugene invite Simone and Cecil over to tour their new forever home. Contessa and Scott face hard truths about their relationships in their first therapy session. Jackie hosts a part to launch her new book 'The Queen V.'

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Bus-ted Cabo
programme.desc: Buffie breaks her silence with Jackie for talking about her infertility, but Jackie hits back hard. Toya has a meltdown when the mini bus breaks down, forcing Simone and Cecil to scramble to come up with a new couple's activity.

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Revenge of the Sup and Paint
programme.desc: Contessa and Scott continue to clash, Jackie apologizes to Buffie for their fight the night before, but Buffie's far from over it. When the guys and the ladies have separate nights out, Quad gets a special girl’s night and Damon winds up in the doghouse.

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Swap Till You Drop
programme.desc: In Cabo San Lucas, the group participates in a good old-fashioned wife swap with games on the beach. Heavenly's anger at Damon going to the strip club boils over. Contessa and Scott's marriage issues are bubbling under the surface.

programme.title: Married to Medicine: Trouble in Spa-radise

programme.title: Movie: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three African-American women are hired by NASA to calculate launch and landings for the first astronaut to make a complete orbit around the Earth. Working in a segregated department, they fight racial barriers to make history in more than one way.

programme.title: Movie: Selma
programme.desc: Over the course of three months in 1965, civil rights activist Martin Luther King, Jr. went up against vicious opposition as he led a campaign to secure equal voting rights for all people. His struggle culminated in an epic march from Selma to Montgomery.

programme.title: Black-ish: Pilot
programme.desc: Dre, an advertising exec, is happily anticipating a promotion at work, which would make him the firm's first African American senior vice president. Rainbow, an anesthesiologist, is looking forward to Dre's raise.

programme.title: Black-ish: THE Word
programme.desc: Jack performs the song 'Gold Digger' at a school talent show and when he sings a lyric that includes THE word, it leads to his possible expulsion from school.

programme.title: Black-ish: Martin Luther Skiing Day

programme.title: Black-ish: Elephant in the Room

programme.title: Black-ish: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: After Dre notices that his neighbour Janine has never invited his family to any of her pool parties, he assumes she is racially stereotyping them as a family that doesn't swim. The kids are shocked to find out that, in fact, Dre doesn’t know how to swim.

programme.title: Black-ish: Lemons

programme.title: Black-ish: One Angry Man

programme.title: Movie: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three African-American women are hired by NASA to calculate launch and landings for the first astronaut to make a complete orbit around the Earth. Working in a segregated department, they fight racial barriers to make history in more than one way.

programme.title: Movie: Selma
programme.desc: Over the course of three months in 1965, civil rights activist Martin Luther King, Jr. went up against vicious opposition as he led a campaign to secure equal voting rights for all people. His struggle culminated in an epic march from Selma to Montgomery.

programme.title: Black-ish: Pilot
programme.desc: Dre, an advertising exec, is happily anticipating a promotion at work, which would make him the firm's first African American senior vice president. Rainbow, an anesthesiologist, is looking forward to Dre's raise.

programme.title: Black-ish: THE Word
programme.desc: Jack performs the song 'Gold Digger' at a school talent show and when he sings a lyric that includes THE word, it leads to his possible expulsion from school.

programme.title: Black-ish: Martin Luther Skiing Day
programme.desc: On the way to the Johnson family's annual Martin Luther King holiday ski trip, Dre realizes his children may not know the significance of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. so he decides to inundate them with Dr. King history facts.

programme.title: Black-ish: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Liberals Dre and Bow go ballistic when Junior declares he's joined the Young Republican Club to impress a girl (ironically named Hillary). Meanwhile, everyone teases Zoey when she finds out she needs glasses.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: After Dre notices that his neighbour Janine has never invited his family to any of her pool parties, he assumes she is racially stereotyping them as a family that doesn't swim. The kids are shocked to find out that, in fact, Dre doesn’t know how to swim.

programme.title: Black-ish: Lemons
programme.desc: The nation is still reeling after the outcome of the presidential election, and tensions are particularly high at Dre's work. Much to his frustration, they haven't been able to get anything done since election night eight weeks ago.

programme.title: Black-ish: One Angry Man
programme.desc: Dre is forced to participate in jury duty after Junior responds to the summons that was thrown away. The case is supposed to be open and shut, but when Dre sees that the defendant is a young African American, he feels responsible to give him a fair trial.

programme.title: Black-ish: ToysRn'tUs
programme.desc: Janine gives Diane a white Girlstory doll for her birthday, and when Bow tries to return it for a black doll, she is shocked by the limited options offered.

programme.title: American Monster: Edge of Reason

programme.title: American Monster: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, Kevin and Joanne Dowling like to capture their kids' milestones on videotape in their modest suburban home. But when a woman in a nearby town is gunned down - and Kevin is accused of murder - his fate hangs on that same home video camera.

programme.title: American Monster: Remote Control

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Last Blanco

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: A Killer Unveiled

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Man in the Background
programme.desc: When two young girls arrive home from school ten days before Christmas to find their father dead, police are able to narrow down the timeline of the murder to an eight-minute window, just before the girls walked in the door.

programme.title: American Monster: Momma's Girl
programme.desc: Great-Grandfather Arthur Burney knows he's lucky to have such a large loving family. But when a dead body is discovered everyone becomes a suspect - and it'll take an unexpected tip-off to reveal the mastermind behind the murder.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: A Killer Unveiled

programme.title: Disappeared: So Close to Home
programme.desc: Ali Lowizter vanishes after getting off the school bus. The investigation stalls for two years until a tip comes in claiming Ali could have been trafficked.

programme.desc: While on a Caribbean cruise, 23-year old Amy Bradley vanishes from her family's cabin and is never seen again. Over a decades-long struggle, her family embarks on countless grueling searches, stopping at nothing, they say, to find their beloved Amy.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Cling 'Til Death
programme.desc: These Deadly Women won't let their men go.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lethal Lovers
programme.desc: Psychopathic killers usually act alone but sometimes fate brings them into contact with another person who shares their urge to kill.

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Vulnerable
programme.desc: A secret addiction drives a young woman to sacrifice her wheelchair bound employer; a scheming caregiver betrays the man who trusts her; and a single mother's desire for a better life leads to a brutal dismemberment.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover's Revenge
programme.desc: When these women were betrayed, they demanded payback. A crazed mother took a custody battle too far, a scorned lover wiped out her competition, and a sex addict stepped on everyone in her way.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Insatiable Greed
programme.desc: It's a dangerous thing when women want money over love.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lethal Teens

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder

programme.title: Deadly Women: Three's a Crowd

programme.title: Deadly Women: Deadly Possession
programme.desc: Three women, who were protective of the people they loved, took matters into their own hands when they felt threatened.

programme.title: Deadly Women: To Have and to Kill

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: Jealousy's a curse but it's never an excuse to kill.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige
programme.desc: Tamara transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character. She installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside, but she faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heater and an immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Snake River Showpiece
programme.desc: Garth and his team brave sub-freezing temperatures in Idaho to build a $590k multi-level deck with four distinct living areas. The indoor-outdoor space features a pizza oven, a mezzanine-level bar overlooking the Snake River and an infrared sauna.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Building Bigger In Texas
programme.desc: Garth travels to the Lone Star State to build its first mega deck. Garth unifies a disjointed patio, doubling the floor space and quadrupling the covered living area. The $325,000 deck is finished with fire pits, a swim spa and a mesquite bar top.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Ultimate Party Deck
programme.desc: A couple in Colorado dislike their home's small, exposed deck that leaves guests crowded. Garth designs a deck that opens up the walls, triples the original deck footprint, and adds a fireplace and TV to create the ultimate party space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Spacious Retreat With Artistic Details
programme.desc: The Mega team overhauls an ugly, exposed and downright dangerous deck disaster. They face challenging weather, rotting wood and even an infestation while transforming two separate and unusable spaces into a sprawling, year-round retreat.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Modern, Zen Oasis With A Rustic Escape
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team has to turn a sunroom, concrete patio, and dirt landing by the pond into one cohesive space. After tearing out the sunroom, they build a steel framed deck with a flat roof that's connected to the existing patio.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Triple Threat Deck With a Pool
programme.desc: The team builds their biggest and most expensive masterpiece over four months on a $750,000 budget. Big problems start after finishing the deck, when freezing temperatures put an indefinite hold on finishing the pool.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Smilin' on Anna Maria Island
programme.desc: After years of vacationing in the area, a woman and her grandmother are ready to purchase a home of their own in the coastal community of Anna Maria Island, FL.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Getting Set in Narragansett, Rhode Island
programme.desc: After renting vacation homes in Narragansett, Rhode Island, for many years, a couple finally buys a place of their own that needs a lot of work. Luckily he is a general contractor and ready to take on the challenge.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gourmets of the Galaxy
programme.desc: The Iowa State Fair welcomes Noah Cappe with a trio of meaty masterpieces, but it's the double Dutch almond funnel that has everyone jumping with joy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mexican Favorites
programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brilliantly Baked
programme.desc: It's time to indulge in some of the best baked goods imaginable as Martha Stewart shows off a beautifully perfect brioche she can't get enough of in New York City.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Fryin' King

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly travel to France to get Bob some French toast. Then, the pugs chase Bob's prized baseball across the city.

programme.desc: Famous race car driver Pippa Powers visits Hot Dog Hills for a reunion with her old car club. The Happy Helpers must show Mr. McSnorter how to relax on vacation.

programme.desc: During Chef Pierre's café opening, Goofy's famous Goofy Dogs are stolen! When the Happy Helpers return to Paris, Cuckoo Loca discovers new family members!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.desc: When Chloe's dad's flight home is cancelled on Father's Day, Keia and the pugs go on an urgent mission to bring him home. Then, when Dash and Duke's favourite toy goes missing, the pugs and Keia search the lake to find it.

programme.desc: A transgender punk rocker tours the United States in order to steal back her songs from her ex-boyfriend.

programme.title: Movie: Water for Elephants
programme.desc: After his parents are killed, a veterinary student leaves school and joins the circus as their vet.

programme.title: Movie: The Honeymooners

programme.title: Movie: Fast Five
programme.desc: The crew find themselves on the wrong side of the law again as they try to get out of Brazil.

programme.title: Watchmen: It's Summer and We're Running Out of Ice
programme.desc: In an alternate America where police conceal their identities behind masks to protect themselves from a terrorist organization, Detective Angela Abar and Chief Judd Crawford investigate the attempted murder of a cop.

programme.title: Watchmen: Martial Feats of Comanche Horsemanship
programme.desc: As Angela relives haunting memories of an attack on her family, she detains a mysterious man who claims responsibility for Tulsa’s most recent murder. Elsewhere, an original play is performed for an audience of one.

programme.title: Watchmen: She Was Killed by Space Junk
programme.desc: Following a late-night visit from the Senator who authored Masked Policing Legislation in Oklahoma, FBI agent Laurie Blake heads to Tulsa to take over the recent murder investigation. Far away, the Lord of the Estate draws unwelcome attention.

programme.title: Watchmen: If You Don't Like My Story, Write Your Own
programme.desc: Reclusive trillionaire Lady Trieu finally enters the stage with a mysterious offer. With Blake getting closer to the truth of her coverup, Angela enlists Looking Glass for help. Meanwhile, the Lord trains two new servants.

programme.title: Watchmen: Little Fear of Lightning
programme.desc: The origin story of Looking Glass is at last revealed, as is the truth behind the greatest hoax in American history. Far away, the Smartest Man in the World plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Movie: The Curse of La Llorona
programme.desc: A social worker's own beloved children are threatened by an evil supernatural terror, forcing her to turn to a disillusioned priest with an interest in mysticism to help save not only her children's souls, but also her own.

programme.title: I May Destroy You
programme.desc: A Londoner must question and rebuild her life after a traumatic incident.

programme.title: Movie: Quantum of Solace
programme.desc: Bond and M discover a secret international power network after an assassination attempt on M. Bond, still sore about his lover's murder, goes rogue in search of a global conspiracy and the search for power over smaller countries.

programme.title: Euphoria: Pilot
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Rue returns home from rehab with no plans to stay clean.

programme.title: Euphoria: 'Stuntin' Like My Daddy
programme.desc: On the first day of school, Rue has a new friend, Jules, but struggles to put the past behind her.

programme.title: Euphoria: Made You Look
programme.desc: Kat starts camming; Jules falls for a boy online; Rue is confronted at NA; Cassie visits McKay at college.

programme.title: Euphoria: Shook Ones Pt. II
programme.desc: Rue tries to get clean for Jules and chaperones Gia at the carnival. Jules encounters Cal with his family and finally meets Tyler. Cassie and Maddy, annoyed at their boyfriends, decide to do molly together.

programme.title: Euphoria: '03 Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the carnival, Maddy and Nate are forced to deal with a police investigation. Jules begins to feel pressured by her role in Rue's sobriety. Kat ignores a confused Ethan and embraces her new lifestyle.

programme.title: Euphoria: The Next Episode
programme.desc: On Halloween, Rue worries about her reliance on Jules when she starts acting strange. McKay questions his future in football. After a weird night with McKay, Cassie spends some time with Daniel. Business is booming for Kat.

programme.title: Euphoria: The Trials and Tribulations of Trying to Pee While Depressed
programme.desc: Rue gets depressed and watches 22 straight episodes of a British reality show. Jules visits an old friend. Cassie looks for advice in the aftermath of Halloween night.

programme.title: Euphoria: And Salt the Earth Behind You
programme.desc: In the season finale, it's the winter formal at East Highland. Rue attempts to repair her relationship with Jules and stands up to Nate. Cassie and Maddy re-evaluate their relationships.

programme.title: Betty
programme.desc: When Janay and Kirt attempt to throw an all-girls skate sesh, an unexpected visitor cuts the 'festivities' short.

programme.title: Movie: For Love of the Game
programme.desc: A pitcher reflects back on his life and career as he works on throwing the perfect game.

programme.title: Movie: Mr. and Mrs. Smith

programme.title: Movie: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
programme.desc: When a group of humans locate an ancient temple in Antarctica, they are drawn into the conflict between two mysterious alien races.

programme.title: Movie: Love Actually
programme.desc: Ten different British couples sort out their love lives during the Christmas holidays.

programme.title: Movie: The Tuskegee Airmen
programme.desc: The first squadron of African-American combat fighters in WWII battle against prejudice.

programme.title: Movie: Mrs. Doubtfire
programme.desc: When his wife wins custody of their children, an actor poses as a female housekeeper in order to spend time with them.

programme.title: Yvonne Orji: Mamma, I Made It

programme.title: Movie: Casino
programme.desc: The rise and fall of ill-fated mobsters in a Las Vegas casino during the 1970s.

programme.title: Shameless: But at Last Came a Knock
programme.desc: Frank has settlement money coming his way, but needs his ex-wife's signature on the documents. Debbie discovers Steve may not be who he says he is. Kev and Veronica receive a visit from Ethel's baby and Family Services. Lip needs money.

programme.title: Billions: The Limitless Sh*t
programme.desc: Axe makes big plays with an unconventional source of inspiration. Chuck goes to desperate lengths for family. Tensions rise in Wendy's relationships. Chuck and Sacker manipulate a past collaborator. Taylor steps up and takes charge.

programme.title: VICE: Citizen’s Unrest and Brazil’s 'Little Flu' and Know Your Enemy
programme.desc: Minneapolis is the centre of the Black Lives Matter protest movement. The impact of COVID-19 on some of Brazil's most vulnerable populations. As the world races to find a vaccine for COVID-19, 'virus hunters' are on a mission to prevent the next pandemic.

programme.title: Californication: Filthy Lucre
programme.desc: Hank returns from his father's funeral with a new manuscript he wants Karen to read. Charlie presents Hank with a production bonus cheque. Bill and Karen have last-minute wedding jitters.

programme.title: Movie: Hell Fest
programme.desc: A young woman and some friends spend Halloween at a traveling festival that promises to deliver scares like they've never experienced, but when she realizes that a killer is using the festivities as a hunting ground she fears that she is his next target.

programme.title: Penny Dreadful: City of Angels: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: Lewis confronts Townsend in his office and Tiago questions Adelaide, where he discovers Josefina is now a member of the Sister Molly's congregation. Rio implores Mateo to forget his old family and embrace her and the Pachecos.

programme.title: Movie: Casino
programme.desc: The rise and fall of ill-fated mobsters in a Las Vegas casino during the 1970s.

programme.title: Jesus Trejo: Stay at Home Son
programme.desc: Jesus Trejo explores his upbringing as an only-child to immigrant parents. From running his first marathon, to winning his first fight, he paints a picture of a first generation Mexican-American, who goes to great lengths to impress his parents.

programme.title: Movie: Ophelia
programme.desc: A lady-in-waiting captures the attention of a young prince.

programme.title: Movie: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: CIA analyst Jack Ryan is drawn into an illegal war against a Colombian drug cartel.

programme.title: Movie: The Best of Enemies
programme.desc: In 1972, a civil rights activist goes up against the Ku Klux Klan in Durham, North Carolina over school integration.

programme.title: Movie: The Legend of Bagger Vance
programme.desc: A down-and-out golfer attempts to recover his game with the help of a mystical caddy.

programme.title: Movie: The Birdcage
programme.desc: A flamboyant drag queen and his partner are asked by their son to hide their lifestyle. Their son plans on bringing his fiancée's father, a conservative politician, to dinner.

programme.title: Movie: Repo Men

programme.title: Movie: Coming to America
programme.desc: An African prince travels to America to avoid an arranged marriage and find a new bride.

programme.title: Movie: Independence Day
programme.desc: When an alien species attacks the human race by destroying New York City, Los Angeles and Washington, the survivors, lead by the President of the United States, a scientist and an Air Force pilot, attempt to thwart future attacks on Earth.

programme.title: Movie: AVPR: Aliens vs. Predator - Requiem
programme.desc: Inhabitants of a small town come together to save themselves from aliens and predators.

programme.title: Movie: Zombieland
programme.desc: Two men struggle to survive as they journey westward to L.A. They rely on each other, their code of rules and their cache of weapons to survive a world overrun by zombies.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Harper, Frontier Chiropractor
programme.desc: Alan reluctantly agrees to a makeover after seeing Judith's new look. Meanwhile, Evelyn stays at Charlie's house to bond with Jake.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Camel Filters and Pheremones
programme.desc: Jake develops a crush on Berta's gorgeous granddaughter, Prudence. Meanwhile, Rose's dream comes true when Charlie pretends that Rose is his girlfriend in order to fend off the flirtatious 16-year-old.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sarah Like Puny Alan
programme.desc: In order to secure a date, Charlie volunteers a flu-ridden Alan to escort the woman's sister and tries desperately to speed up the recovery. But when Charlie is the one who gets ill before the date, their roles get reversed.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Can't Afford Hyenas
programme.desc: Charlie discovers that his accountant is inept and his debts are all overdue. While Alan convinces Charlie to cut his spending, Charlie teaches Jake about sports gambling.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Round One to the Hot Crazy Chick
programme.desc: Charlie is intrigued when he and Alan find a sexy, but seemingly crazy, woman hitting a car with a baseball bat.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Was Saliva, Alan
programme.desc: Frankie is forced to explain why she is in hiding with her eight-year-old daughter, Joanie. While both brothers are interested, only one of them manages to win her heart. Meanwhile, Jake is disinterested in Joanie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ate the Hamburgers, Wearing the Hats
programme.desc: Alan offends Charlie by selecting their crazy cousins as Jake's legal guardians in case of emergency. When Jake suffers an injury, Charlie races to prove he can be a responsible guardian.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: An Old Flame With a New Wick
programme.desc: Charlie agrees to meet with a former girlfriend who broke his heart, but he is in for a surprise when he discovers that she is now a man named Bill. After managing to overcome his shock, Charlie's new friendship is jeopardized when Bill dates Evelyn.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Remember the Coatroom, I Just Don't Remember You
programme.desc: Judith's sister, Liz, hits on Alan at Jake's party despite having a history with Charlie. Meanwhile, Evelyn celebrates Jake's birthday in her own way.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hey, I Can Pee Outside in the Dark
programme.desc: Jake continuously plays 'Smoke on the Water' on his guitar and has developed a grumpy attitude. Alan tries a father/son chat, Charlie offers a jam session and Berta thinks Jake is just constipated.

programme.title: Movie: Ocean's Eleven
programme.desc: A gang of thieves devise a plan to rob an underground vault that services three Las Vegas casinos.

programme.title: Movie: The Great Debaters
programme.desc: Based on a true story, an East Texas debate squad train to compete and take on the Harvard debate team.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All-Stars: I’m in Love!
programme.desc: The All Stars form 3 competing girl-groups to compose lyrics, choreography and perform the new, pop crush anthem “I’m In Love!” Guest judges Tessa Thompson and Madison Beer join the love-fest.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All-Stars: Get a Room!
programme.desc: The All Stars dive into the world of celebrity branding as they design their own boutique hotel suite experiences! Guest judges Nicole Byer and design guru Martyn Lawrence Bullard check in to check them out!

programme.title: Untucked All Stars
programme.desc: This week’s top All Star and her safe sisters lean on each other, as they share personal life stories. Michelle Visage pops in on this week’s eliminated queen.

programme.title: Movie: Drumline
programme.desc: A gifted drummer from New York wins a full scholarship to a Southern University where he will lead the drum line.

programme.title: Movie: Lottery Ticket
programme.desc: A young man must survive a long weekend after his neighbours in the projects learn that he has a winning lottery ticket.

programme.desc: When Philip's parents visit, they embarrass him with stories of his pet pig.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Mistaken Identity
programme.desc: Will and Carlton are arrested and accused of committing a string of automobile thefts.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Banks Shot
programme.desc: Philip saves the day after Will borrows the car to go to a pool hall and gets hustled.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Striptease for Two
programme.desc: Will and Carleton perform as male strippers in order to recover pawned jewellery.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two hip Miami undercover detectives have 72 hours to nab the crooks who stole millions in recovered heroin from the police station.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Narcotics detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett have been assigned to a high-tech task force that is investigating the flow of designer ecstasy into Miami. Their inquiries inadvertently lead them to a major conspiracy involving a vicious kingpin.

programme.title: Movie: My Summer Prince
programme.desc: When a prince finds himself in some hot water for his partying ways, the royal family hires a PR consultant. But when she falls ill, her assistant steps in to take control of the campaign and possibly the prince's heart.

programme.title: Movie: Fashionably Yours
programme.desc: A woman decides to move home after years of organizing fashion shows. Her mover decides to show her how beautiful her new home is, leading to an unexpected romance for both of them.

programme.title: Movie: Hallmark Hall of Fame: A Christmas Love Story
programme.desc: A youth-choir director is tasked with writing the title song for her Christmas Eve show but becomes distracted when a gifted boy joins the choir. Unbeknownst to her, this boy does not tell his widowed father of his plans to sing in the service.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Even Grandmas Get the Blues
programme.desc: While babysitting for her granddaughter, a man mistakes Blanche as being the baby's mother and Blanche does nothing to set him straight. Meanwhile, Sophia gets ready for the Festival of the Dancing Virgins.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Witness
programme.desc: Rose has a new man, Carl, in her life but suddenly out of the blue Miles returns, still undercover in the Witness Protection Program.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: What a Difference a Date Makes
programme.desc: The man who stood Dorothy up for her senior prom contacts her and they make a date. After learning why he stood her up, Dorothy unleashes her wrath on the person at fault, Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love for Sale
programme.desc: The girls prepare for the Children's Hospital Bachelorette Auction and a reluctant Dorothy decides to participate. She is in for a quick surprise when Stan walks in and begins bidding.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: The deathbed confession of an ex-patient at Shady Pines means bad news for Sophia, since in her confession she stated that she and Sophia started the 1985 Shady Pines fire.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: Sophia can't remember the events of the evening of the 1985 Shady Pines fire and decides to jump bail and go back to Sicily. With the threat of Sophia going to jail, the girls reminisce about good times they have spent together.

programme.title: Frasier: Breaking the Ice
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles go on an ice fishing trip with Martin in an attempt at male bonding.

programme.title: Frasier: An Affair to Forget
programme.desc: After receiving a call from a listener, Frasier suspects Maris is having an affair with her fencing instructor.

programme.title: Frasier: Agents in America, Part Three
programme.desc: Frasier's agent, Bebe Glazer, advises him to hold out in an attempt to get a pay raise. After the station paints over his parking space and auditions replacements, Frasier demands that she negotiate. Of course, nothing is ever simple with Bebe.

programme.title: Frasier: The Innkeepers
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles decide to open their own restaurant but when opening night arrives, everything that could go wrong does. Martin, Daphne and Roz try to help out, but the entire night ends in chaos.

programme.title: Frasier: Dark Victory
programme.desc: Frasier is looking forward to a quiet weekend at home but ends up helping everyone else.

programme.title: Frasier: She's the Boss
programme.desc: Frasier holds his ground when the new station manager orders him to make show changes.

programme.title: Frasier: Shrink Rap
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles consult a family therapist after their disastrous attempt to go into private practice together.

programme.title: Frasier: Martin Does It His Way
programme.desc: A loathsome, late great aunt leaves a legacy requesting that Frasier deliver her eulogy.

programme.title: Frasier: Leapin' Lizards
programme.desc: Frasier seeks retaliation for Bulldog's on-air jokes, landing Kate in the hospital.

programme.title: Frasier: Kisses Sweeter Than Wine
programme.desc: Frasier's home needs minor repair work before he hosts a wine-tasting party for his club.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Henny Penny: Straight, No Chaser
programme.desc: The girls are quarantined with first-graders when they all catch the measles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Hey Look Me Over
programme.desc: The discovery of a photo of Blanche in bed with Rose's husband threatens their friendship.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Case of the Libertine Belle
programme.desc: The girls participate in a murder mystery weekend and Dorothy has a ball when she solves a mystery. However, when Blanche is accused committing a real murder, Dorothy will have to use all her keen detective skills to find the real murderer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her granddaughter, Melissa, and the only thing that Blanche has on her mind is Melissa winning a Little Miss Beauty Contest. Meanwhile, Dorothy hires a nurse to look after a recuperating Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That's for Me to Know
programme.desc: Blanche learns from a city inspector that she either has to lose a renter or make modifications to her home costing $10,000. Meanwhile, Dorothy demands to know the identity of the groom in a hidden wedding picture of Sophia's.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?
programme.desc: After Miles gives Rose a friendship ring, Rose becomes convinced Charlie is trying to contact her from the grave with the message that he disproves of her relationship with Miles.

programme.title: Movie: Love on the Sidelines
programme.desc: A young woman falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback sidelined with injury.

programme.title: Movie: Love on the Menu
programme.desc: A chef makes a deal with a frozen food executive in order to save his restaurant.

programme.title: Movie: Bottled With Love
programme.desc: After being stood up, Abbey gets inspired to open her heart in a letter, put it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out.

programme.title: Movie: Stop the Wedding
programme.desc: A young single attorney finds out her mother is marrying a TV star and tries to stop it.

programme.title: South Park: Major Boobage
programme.desc: In a South Park homage to the 1981 film, 'Heavy Metal,' the boys are trying to get Kenny off the latest drug craze that's captured the junior high and under set.

programme.title: South Park: The List
programme.desc: The girls in the fourth grade class have made a secret list that rates every boy's looks from cutest to ugliest. The boys steal the list, but are unprepared to deal with the results.

programme.title: South Park: Bass to Mouth
programme.desc: The kids' most scandalous secrets are being leaked on an outrageous new gossip website.

programme.title: South Park: Butt Out
programme.desc: After singing and dancing representatives from an anti-smoking campaign rap about the dangers of smoking, the kids at South Park Elementary believe it to be cooler than the campaign, and take up the habit.

programme.title: South Park: Butters' Very Own Episode
programme.desc: Alone and lost, Butters determinedly makes his way through porn theatres and gay bath houses in an effort to get his dad back home in time to eat at Bennigan's for his parents' anniversary.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Incredible Gift
programme.desc: After sustaining a severe head injury, Cartman appears to have the power to see into the future. South Park detectives are quick to enlist his help in cracking unsolved murder cases.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Soul Food
programme.desc: The guys debate who is blacker; Bobby McFerrin duels Michael Winslow to death.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Slap-Ass: In Recovery
programme.desc: A baseball player deals with his addiction to slapping ass, a mobster takes vengeance on someone who crossed him, and Steve Urkel drives a man insane.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Michael Jackson Halloween
programme.desc: Jordan and Keegan celebrate Halloween by fleeing racist zombies; the stars of 'Human Centipede' have a scary reunion, and visit a struggling public wizard school.

programme.title: Key & Peele: Concussion Quarterback
programme.desc: A football player with a concussion tries to inspire his team, a man accuses his wife of cheating on him with a dog and a restaurant owner scares off his patrons.

programme.title: Roy Wood Jr.: Father Figure
programme.desc: Roy Wood Jr. provides his take on black history museums, how the rules of gang colours are unfair and why black people don't write patriotic songs.

programme.title: South Park: The Tale of Scrotie McBoogerballs
programme.desc: The boys are given a controversial book to read in school and it inspires them to write one of their own. They convince Butters to take credit for the filth that they have written, but become jealous when he is hailed as a literary genius.

programme.title: South Park: The Ring
programme.desc: Kenny takes his new girlfriend to a Jonas Brothers' concert where they each get purity rings.

programme.title: South Park: Fourth Grade
programme.desc: Fearing their new teacher, Miss Choksondik, the kids build a time machine from Timmy's electronic wheelchair to travel back in time to the glory days of the third grade.

programme.title: South Park: Night of the Living Homeless
programme.desc: Ignoring the homeless in South Park becomes impossible when their numbers become overwhelming and their lust for spare change becomes insatiable. The boys devise a plan to rid the town of homeless once and for all.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: South Park: Jakovasaurs
programme.desc: The boys discover a prehistoric creature called a Jackovasaur while camping at Stark's Pond.

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Mom Is Still a Dirty Slut
programme.desc: The boys and most of the town wait for Dr. Mephesto to regain consciousness and reveal the identity of Cartman's father.

programme.title: South Park: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls
programme.desc: South Park's first film festival attracts crowds of pretentious, tofu-eating movie lovers to the quiet mountain town. The influx of raw vegetable waste taxes the sewage system putting Mr. Hankey's life in jeopardy.

programme.title: South Park: Red Hot Catholic Love
programme.desc: A sexual abuse scandal involving Catholic priests hits South Park and is taken all the way to the Vatican.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan: Chinpoko Mon. Little do they know, they are being brainwashed by the Japanese to once again bomb Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: South Park: The Wacky Molestation Adventure
programme.desc: To get back at his parents for not letting him go to a concert, Kyle tells the police that his parents molested him. Soon, the whole town is free of adults and divided into two rival factions.

programme.title: South Park: Asspen
programme.desc: While the adults are trapped at a time-share sales meeting, Stan is challenged by the best skier on the mountain to compete for the prettiest girl's affections.
