programme.title: Movie: The Good Mistress
programme.desc: A young woman recovering from alcoholism gets caught up in a small town scandal.

programme.title: Movie: Trapped: The Alex Cooper Story
programme.desc: After coming out as gay, a young woman's parents send her to an abusive Mormon conversion camp.

programme.title: Movie: Nanny Lockdown
programme.desc: Chloe finds the perfect live-in nanny position with the Brown family, but quickly realizes that things aren't what they seem.

programme.title: Movie: His Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: After an attack by a stalker, a young woman moves to a new city looking for a new start.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fate Date
programme.desc: When a couple is found dead inside their home, police question if a third victim found outside was just a good Samaritan or involved in the crime. E-mail tracking leads police to the world of internet dating and to the den of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoot to Thrill
programme.desc: A teenager returns home after a night out with friends, and discovers his father's body lying in a pool of blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Flashover
programme.desc: A fire erupted in the Kings Cross Underground Station in London.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face

programme.title: Henry Danger: Game of Phones

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Beginning of the End

programme.title: Henry Danger: Captain Drex

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Fate of Danger: Part I

programme.title: Henry Danger: The Fate of Danger: Part II

programme.title: Mom: Xanax and a Baby Duck

programme.title: Mom: Cornbread and a Cashmere Onesie

programme.title: George Lopez: George's Mom Faces Hard Tambien
programme.desc: George and Angie begin looking forward to being empty nesters as Carmen prepares for college. Meanwhile Benny may face hard times.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Club SpongeBob/ My Pretty Seahorse

programme.desc: The Mayor makes robotic pants to cheat in a contest.

programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Greasy Buffoons/ Model Sponge

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spin the Bottle/ There's a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Puppification
programme.desc: Michael blends juices with a sticker at an appliance store, and then reverses the food chain ay a pet shop. Later, at a doggy spa, a rejuvenation machine turns back time.

programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Movie: Black Panther
programme.desc: After his father's death, T'Challa becomes both the ruler of the secretive kingdom of Wakanda and the superhero Black Panther. With outside threats looming, the young king teams up with a CIA agent to both save his kingdom and prevent a war.

programme.title: Movie: Just Mercy
programme.desc: Civil rights attorney Bryan Stevenson fights for justice and works to free a wrongly convicted prisoner from death row.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Justice
programme.desc: After getting Emily out of prison, Adam and his sister Rhea take on the justice system, shining a spotlight on the infamous McDonalds hot coffee lawsuit, and the substantial problems with the jury duty system.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Prison
programme.desc: Adam and Eve shed light on jail rehabilitation, solitary confinement and the fact that corporations make money off of prison inmates.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Orlando Leyba Headlines
programme.desc: Orlando Leyba headlines. Plus, Donnell Rawlings tells a story about the time his bike was stolen, and Just Nesh breaks loose in the dressing room.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Yamaneika
programme.desc: Comedians bring their hilarious personal stories to life with a reinvention of stand-up.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Michelle Buteau Headlines
programme.desc: Michelle Buteau headlines, while Alex Scott expresses gratitude to the unsung heroes of the work place while Terrence DeLane shares his love for women with experience in the bedroom.

programme.title: Fameless: Zings and Zonks
programme.desc: An aspiring Tv host has a drone turn against him, a would-be prankster becomes a tyrannosaurus wrecks, and an insult comic gets taken for a ride.

programme.title: Fameless: Raiders of the Lost Art
programme.desc: An aspiring TV host learns the real art of pranking, and an attempt to take the antiques game by storm comes to an electrifying halt.

programme.title: Fameless: High Speed Chase
programme.desc: An aspiring cop's chance to be a crime fighter crumbles with a pathetic partner, and an MC's hopes of surprising a pair of famous twins goes up in flames.

programme.title: Fameless: The Home Wrecker

programme.title: Hack My Life: Keep on Hacking

programme.title: Hack My Life: Good Hack Hunting
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke test hacks for holding it in, and Nurse Hackie has the cure for itchy bites.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Hack Paper Scissors
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke find out that poo on the shoe isn't good luck, and Brooke tests some hacks for her pup. Plus, learn some hacks to go undercover when the Cold-Blooded Hacker tries to swipe some bling.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You're Cut Off
programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stare Master
programme.desc: The guys play a game of copycat at the park while babysitting kids, and then hit the supermarket for a game of catch and release.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Statue of Limitations
programme.desc: The guys pose as inhospitable restaurant hosts, then beg strangers to babysit their grandfathers. Plus the longest punishment in Jokers' history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Whose Phone Is Ringing?
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr hit a bull's-eye at a clothing store, sabotage each other in a focus group, and the big loser is called upon at a book reading.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day
programme.desc: The guys go to a supermarket with bells on and try to reminisce with strangers in the park. Plus, tonight's three losers are put through an epic trial by fire.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Little Bit of Everywhere
programme.desc: Guy samples international cuisine found across America.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Home and Away
programme.desc: Guy tries favourites in Chicago, a Peruvian place and visits Oklahoma City.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: BBQ, Burgers and Beyond
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy's biting into burgers and barbecue. First up, he heads back to an O.G. Triple D BBQ joint in Oklahoma City to see what they're smokin' these days. Then, in Roy, Utah, a burger biz flippin' patties for the third generation.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Biscuits, Bagels and BLTs
programme.desc: A breakfast joint in Portland where they make Buttermilk pancakes with sweet potato, and a diner in Anselmo, California that makes a BLT with soft-shelled Crab.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creative Creations
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into inventive eats. In Burlington, Vt., a funky joint cooking up mac and cheese pancakes. In Richmond, Va., a down-home spot loadin' up their biscuits and going gangbusters with grits.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Italian
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out classic Italian joints including a Baltimore deli making lasagna from scratch, a San Diego pizza joint where the dough is hand-tossed and a spaghetti house that's been cooking up classic family recipes for 60 years.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Grub
programme.desc: Guy is on the search for some awesome foreign flavours.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Neighborhood Favorites
programme.desc: Guy visits restaurants in Santa Fe and Salt Lake City.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sicilian and Seafood
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from incredible Italian to sensational seafood. In Oklahoma City, a funky food truck putting out wood-fired pizza and grandma's Sicilian meatball recipe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Traditional Dishes
programme.desc: Guy Fieri rolls in for classic meals done right: In Baltimore, a shack steamin' crabs with corn on the cob; In Memphis, the little place with classic southern favorites; And in Minnesota, a strip mall joint doin' home-made Italian.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A World of Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's firing up an entire world of barbecue on this trip. In Wilmington, a righteous spot is smokin' up chicken salad and off-the-chain chili.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Better Than Ever
programme.desc: Guy Fieri rolls out to long-time local favourites including an eight-decades-old Alabama spot legendary for soft shell crab sandwich, an Italian favourite in Omaha and one of the oldest restaurants in Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Something From Everywhere
programme.desc: Guy Fieri discovers real deal dishes born elsewhere in Norwalk, CT, Minneapolis and Chicago.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Doin' Their Own Thing
programme.desc: Guy Fieri uncovers joints doing things their own unique way, a retro joint making shark tacos. In Chicago, a dinner prepares seafood sixteen different ways, and a chef from Montreal does a Canadian take of Jewish deli.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sicilian and Seafood
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from incredible Italian to sensational seafood. In Oklahoma City, a funky food truck putting out wood-fired pizza and grandma's Sicilian meatball recipe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Passport of Flavor
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diving into killer cuisine with international flair. In Lansing he checks out a Middle Eastern joint that puts out serious shawarma and gangster grape leaves. Plus, a Vietnamese spot is serving real-deal spring rolls and brisket.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island and Desert
programme.desc: Guy finds a desert treasure and island flavour. In Palm Desert, California, he visits a breakfast-lunch cafe dishin' out a righteous rib melt and nostalgic breakfast tarts. Then, in Maui, Hawaii, a funky gluten-free spot makes full-flavoured pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Carnivore Creations
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's getting right to the meat of the matter with some carnivore creations. In Portland, Ore., a bomb butchery puttin' out porchetta and a unique style of prosciutto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Multicultural Cooking
programme.desc: Guy digs into traditions from many cultures, including tortillas, tacos, Jewish deli food, and Puerto-Rican specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Fried and Smoked
programme.desc: Sometimes it's not what you're cooking but how you're cooking it. Outside San Antonio, Guy Fieri checks in on the O.G. Triple D, and she's blowin' his mind with her new fried food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Meat Lovers
programme.desc: It's meat any way you like it when Guy Fieri heads to Miami to see what his buddy is doing with chicken and duck. A noodle shop in Portland, Ore., is churning out thousands of dumplings a week these days.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Something for Everyone
programme.desc: Guy visits one of his favourite places in Seattle from the very first season to see what's new for breakfast and lunch. In Minneapolis, Cuban cuisine has taken off since DDD visited, and in Portland, Oregon, two dudes still crank out crazy sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Meat Mashup
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is reliving his most meat-tastic memories, starting in Kansas City, Mo., at an award-winning BBQ joint serving up pork belly burnt ends.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Slurpin' Soup
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri grabs a spoon for slurpin', starting in Honolulu with Guy's Hawaiian doppelganger, who's running a bowling alley diner known for killer oxtail soup.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Portobello Cheese-steak Fries
programme.desc: The secret to Rachael's Portobello cheese-steak fries is that there's no steak. Instead of sliced beef, she packs Portobello mushrooms with flavor and layers them on fries with cheese sauce for a meat-free win.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Sicilian Splash Party
programme.desc: Valerie went on the trip of a lifetime to Italy last summer, but this year, she's bringing Italy to her own backyard! She's hosting an elegant poolside party inspired by her adventures in Sicily to kick off the summer.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Man's Best Food
programme.desc: The Kitchen has a menu of Father's Day favourites, including "brewed awakening" rib roast, 1-2-3 horseradish sauce, and roasted Mexican corn salad.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Reunion With a Song
programme.desc: After being on the road performing for more than three years, Trisha Yearwood is ready to spend some time with her family. She throws a family reunion to catch up and share some great food. Her menu includes grilled potato salad and back cheeseburgers.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Chinese Family Faves
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making some tasty family favorites to celebrate a visit from her dad. The menu includes chicken pot stickers with dipping sauce, scallion pancakes with maple carrot slaw and green beans with her versatile magic sesame sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home Part 5
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is whipping up fantastic five-ingredient dishes with the help of her kid film crew. Her husband, Ladd, shares his input as she makes fast and fabulous Bruschetta Chicken, a spin on a favorite appetizer.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dad's Dinner Delivery
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her son, Todd, are delivering dinner to her dad and stepmom, so Ree makes an Italian meal of creamy chicken cacciatore soup, parmesan herb drops biscuits and Italian salad with parmesan crisps.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Brunch Party
programme.desc: The Kitchen is raising a glass to a weekend favorite - brunch! Sunny Anderson starts the party right with her breakfast steak and eggs with chimichurri and Jeff Mauro adds bubbles to his strawberry and prosecco scones, complete with sparkling lemon icing.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Family Favorites with Allie Colleen
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood's daughter, Allie, joins her in the kitchen to learn some tips and tricks as they breathe new life into some favourite childhood dishes.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Liquor Store Secrets
programme.desc: Ina's unlocking her liquor store secrets and easy techniques that take red wine-braised short ribs, fennel soup gratin and an awesome fresh apple spice cake to the next level.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: It's a Fieri Father's Day!
programme.desc: Four fathers are out to prove they're the world's greatest dad in the kitchen, and Guy's son, Hunter, is out to prove he's the best co-host on Triple G!. The chefs are forced to use the express lane when making a family dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: DDD-licious Burgers
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites his favorite burger chefs from Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives to compete in Flavortown and grill, baby, grill. First, Guy has the chefs shop for ingredients in their signature burger and loaded fries combo using only tongs and a grill lid.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Guys
programme.desc: Four chefs from four of Guy Fieri's own restaurants face off in two rounds of culinary combat. Guy kicks things off by challenging his guys to make their best burger without any key ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Pro Athletes And Judges
programme.desc: Sports and great food are a natural combination, and that's what's on Guy Fieri's mind when he invites three professional athletes to team up with some of Flavortown's finest judges.

programme.title: River Monsters: Mekong Mutilator
programme.desc: The Mekong River is well known for its monstrous fish. This time, Jeremy is drawn to the spot in Southeast Asia after reports of something that has sliced cleanly through a young man's testicle.

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Apocalypse
programme.desc: Hundreds died when the Sobral Santos sank on the Amazon, many rumoured to have been eaten alive. Jeremy retraces the doomed boat's last voyage and faces adversaries as he tries to uncover what was being the Amazon Apocalypse.

programme.title: River Monsters: Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous monster of Loch Ness and to succeed where so many have failed. The journey takes him from the depths of Loch Ness to the volcanoes of Iceland, all in pursuit of the mother of all monsters.

programme.desc: Capybara Lily is pregnant and keepers are hoping for a big litter to liven things up in the all-female group. When newborn Henry emerges, he quickly learns to enjoy having the run of the paddock, and the attention of all the females.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Coral Super Bowl

programme.desc: A tomistoma, a freshwater crocodilian, stops laying eggs and a team of keepers scrambles to treat her. The veterinary team has to rescue a baby antelope that isn't getting the care it needs from its mother. And Mert the Goose takes a field trip.

programme.desc: When keepers introduce two tigers as potential mates, the process proves bumpy. A pair of African porcupines arrive at the zoo, requiring delicate handling. And a pregnancy check on a 3,000 pound rhino necessitates some highly specialized equipment.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: On the Throne

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Winning the Location Lottery

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Dreaming Big in Boston

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Milk Money
programme.desc: Fran stopped by the grocery store for milk and came home a multi-millionaire from a lottery win. Now, she and her partner Sharon are planning to retire and want to find their dream home in Suffield, Connecticut.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Old Florida Charm

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Bliss in the 'Burbs

programme.desc: Erika is left seeing stars at her astrology party when old resentments flare up between Kyle, Teddi and Dorit. Denise's simmering frustration boils over in front of a speechless Lisa Rinna. After drinks, Garcelle questions a new friend's priorities.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: This Means War!
programme.desc: Josh Flagg accuses Josh Altman of client poaching when he learns that Altman is working with his former drama camp counsellor. Wanting to have the last say about the issue, Josh Flagg finds a way to retaliate without breaching his ethics.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: The Lads Take L.A.
programme.desc: Inventory is low and the demand is high, agents are working hard to stay one sale ahead of their competition. No problem for Josh Altman who nabs a listing that every agent in town wanted.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: English Beat Down
programme.desc: James and David crash Josh Altman's open house and trash talk the property. Josh won't forget this any time soon. Josh Flagg sells his Bel Air Crest listing for $9 million despite the fact his client cannot contain herself.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Real Estate on Wheels
programme.desc: After taking a hard fall, Josh Flagg tries to find his good friend an investment property, all while in agonizing pain. Then, Josh Altman loses a coveted listing in the Hollywood Hills, but devises a plan to get it back.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Royally Sucked
programme.desc: While showing a Hollywood Hills estate, David and James cross paths with an infamous ne'er-do-well who brought shame on the Royal family. Josh Flagg finds himself caught in the middle of close family friends who are at odds.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Flagg vs. Serhant
programme.desc: Josh Flagg gets the better of agent Ryan Serhant when Ryan's client makes an offer on Flagg's property. Heather and Josh meet a wedding planner who is baffled by their unpreparedness.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Hard Cold Cash
programme.desc: When Josh's client goes borderline ballistic during a negotiation, he stashes other agents in the freezer. Hip hop artist Tyga checks out David and James' ultimate bachelor pad and later Josh goes back in time to sell a 1919 Beverly Hills home.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: There Goes the Neighborhood
programme.desc: David makes a rash promise to a client without first consulting James, which could ultimately cost them the listing. Josh Altman snags a similar listing just blocks away from the Brits and the competition is anything but neighbourly.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: All Business, No Pleasure
programme.desc: Josh Altman tries to find the perfect home for a famous street artist who insists on going to every showing incognito. Meanwhile, Heather accuses Josh of going behind her back after he and his brother, Matt, make a major decision without her.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Realty Bites
programme.desc: After being hired by a hard-nosed client who used to be a top real estate agent, James and David come up with a brilliant strategy to impress him. However, once the negotiation begins, their client threatens to fire them.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Million Dollar Frisking
programme.desc: When Josh Altman and his brother Matt receive a full-body pat-down before meeting with a potential international client demanding they find the perfect Beverly Hills getaway in just two days, the pressure is on to deliver.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Circling the Waters
programme.desc: When Josh Altman's idol hires him to find commercial space for his West Coast headquarters, Altman moves his relationship with Heather to the back burner once again. David and James put it all on the line when they coax a developer to sell their new home.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles: Crossroads
programme.desc: A $13-million listing in Laguna Beach forces the Brits to sink-or-swim in a new territory. Still reeling from the loss of his grandmother, Josh Flagg struggles to stay focused on a new listing. Josh Altman finds himself at a major crossroad.

programme.title: Black-ish: Who's Afraid of the Big Black Man

programme.title: Black-ish: Black History Month
programme.desc: Dre is upset after he learns that Jack and Diane are getting the same surface-level education about Black History Month that he got when he was growing up.

programme.title: Black-ish: Hope

programme.title: Snapped: Marie Hilley

programme.desc: Nikki Whitehead was a single mom working toward a brighter future. She found love, moved into a nice neighborhood and enrolled in college. Then, tragedy struck. Police searched for answers but one thing was certain. This crime was personal.

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Hunted to Death

programme.title: Mark of a Killer: Deadly Design
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores. Police release surveillance footage to the press and ask the public for help to find a duffle bag wielding murderer before he strikes again.

programme.desc: A suspicious fire hides a deadly secret and forces a son to testify against his only remaining parent.

programme.desc: A deadly break-in pits mother against daughter, revealing a secret addiction.

programme.title: Snapped: Lateisha Jandreau

programme.title: Deadly Cults: Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: A family is desperate to find their daughter, Gail, who ran off with a strange cult. Years later, police are called to a posh mansion near San Diego and are shocked to find 39 bodies in a mass suicide. Was Gail one of the deceased or did she escape?

programme.title: Deadly Cults: The Camp
programme.desc: A quadruple murder rocks a small California town, leading police to investigate a refugee camp run by a local man. What appeared as a quiet, small community soon reveals itself as a sinister group full of manipulation, abuse, and violent rituals.

programme.title: Deadly Cults: The Ervilites

programme.title: Deadly Cults: Synanon
programme.desc: A Los Angeles lawyer is attacked by a poisonous rattlesnake leading police to a bizarre cult veiled as a drug and alcohol rehab facility. The cops uncover a group of blind followers willing to do anything at their leader's urging, even murder.

programme.title: Life Story: Courtship

programme.title: Life Story: Parenthood
programme.desc: Raising offspring and continuing the line is the next best thing to immortality.

programme.desc: Examine clues from Madagascar's animals, plants and landscape to discover how the island's past has produced its present; the Tsingy have cut off animals in isolated gorges allowing them to evolve unique species.

programme.title: Madagascar: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: The narrow eastern strip of the island is rich in life; travel from the highest mountains, where trees are few, to lush rainforests, to the tropical coast, home to ring-tailed lemurs, jewelled geckos and predatory wasps.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans: Ultimate Battleships
programme.desc: Draining the North Sea reveals hidden secrets of WWI's most powerful weapons.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans: Pacific War Megawrecks

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Investigators remove water from the picture to explain natural and man-made discoveries.

programme.title: Juneteenth: A Celebration of Overcoming

programme.desc: Drain the Oceans sheds new light on Hitler’s reign of terror and ultimate demise.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: World's Strangest Ghost Towns
programme.desc: The world's strangest ghost towns are home to dark secrets, creepy buildings, and eerie sights, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Jungle of the Damned
programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: House of Horror
programme.desc: An eerie set of buildings in Paris is evidence of an unspeakable evil. New discoveries reveal the horrific things that happened here, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare at Fort Paranoia
programme.desc: A strange bunker in a treacherous landscape once belonged a notorious dictator who's paranoid fantasies drove bizarre and elaborate feats of engineering. New discoveries reveal the secrets of these structures and why the nightmares that built them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Anarchy on Ireland's Alcatraz
programme.desc: The ruins of an abandoned prison are evidence of a chaotic riot that put the prisoners in charge. Special access to its burnt-out interior reveals how inmates took over Ireland's Alcatraz and why it is deserted today.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover Makes Three
programme.desc: Sometimes the love of one person isn't satisfying.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hot Tempers, Cold Hearts
programme.desc: When these Deadly Women turn green-eyed they reveal their hot tempers and cold hearts.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Innocent blood spills when these deadly women reach their tipping point.

programme.title: A Deadly Flame
programme.desc: A one-night-stand in Florida turns hot and heavy, but when one party wants more than the other, sparks fly.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Flowers in the Lake
programme.desc: Leesa Nascimento was murdered on July 6, 2010 by being shot in the head. A recently sacked co-worker, Lorenza Sam is traced after evidence was found that tied him to the murder and he was arrested. He was sentenced to Life in Prison without parole.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Roadside Murder
programme.desc: Theresa Wesolowski was murdered on May 29, 1999, leaving police baffled for nearly 10 years. They finally got a break in the case when a new DNA technique identified a co-worker, Mark Libecki, who was convicted of 1st degree murder in 2009.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Robert Henry, an exec in Tacoma, was murdered in 1995 by a masked gunman. His wife tells the Police she thought he was killed by a former business associate. Det. Yerbury investigated and pieced together the evidence that convicted Larry Shandola.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: The Evil Inside
programme.desc: At work, Kerri Harris and her friend discover a camera secreted in the ladies' restroom. Police examine the evidence, but less than 24 hours into their investigation, Kerri is found stabbed to death in her office. Her co-workers are just feet away.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Target on Her Back
programme.desc: 24-year-old grocery store worker, Caroline Nosal befriends her introvert colleague Christopher O'Kroley. Chris is eager to make friends with Caroline possibly too eager. Caroline complains to store management about Chris things don't turn out as planned.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Never Predicted
programme.desc: When Andrea Farrington meets fellow employee Alex Kozak she thinks that romance could be on the horizon. She has no idea that feelings of romance will be replaced by suspicion and fear, leading to a final rejection that has fatal consequences.

programme.title: A Deadly Flame
programme.desc: A one-night-stand in Florida turns hot and heavy, but when one party wants more than the other, sparks fly.

programme.title: The Murderous Mr. Handcuffs
programme.desc: When Laura Simonson, a 37-year-old loving mother from Farmington, Minnesota, is left devastated by the death of her teenage daughter, she seeks comfort in the darkest corners of online dating and meets the man who will seal her fate.

programme.title: The Death of a Sugar Daddy
programme.desc: The murder of an 83-year-old becomes extremely suspicious when police find out that he was having an affair with a woman half his age.

programme.title: Betrayed: A Bitter Pill
programme.desc: Newlywed pharmaceutical rep Debbie Ashley turns up dead in her car trunk in a mystery ensnaring her ex-husbands, a doting coworker, her daughter's shadowy boyfriend, and her respected executive husband.

programme.title: Betrayed: Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: Bright aspiring architect Claudette Ficik, 19, charms every young man she meets, from coworkers at the pet store to classmates. When her body turns up in an Atlanta area river, a shocking secret is revealed: she was pregnant.

programme.title: Betrayed: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: Cindy Thompson, 27, reconnects with her high school sweetheart and gets pregnant with his child, but someone wants to snuff out the couple's happiness, and Cindy's life.

programme.title: Betrayed: One Way Ticket Out
programme.desc: When lifelong Long Islander Donna Bocklet announces she's leaving for Florida, it sends shock waves through her close circle of friends and family that ends in her brutal murder.

programme.title: Betrayed: The Other Modesto Girl
programme.desc: The world knows about Laci Peterson and Chandra Levy, but what about the 'other' Modesto girl, Dena Raley-McCluskey, whose sudden disappearance was no less shocking - and mysterious.

programme.title: Betrayed: Unholy Alliances
programme.desc: Church secretary Dorothy 'Dot' Finelli, 59, goes missing and turns up dead, as police explore if she's killed by a jealous new Internet date or somebody she's known for years within her own family circle.

programme.title: Betrayed: Murder in the Mortuary
programme.desc: Julie Bowling stares down death every day as a cancer therapist and part-time funeral home worker. When she's killed while her husband is out of town, the focus turns to his secret life and shaky finances.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Hitman 4 Hire
programme.desc: Leslie and Brian Long live in an affluent suburban of St. Clairsville, Ohio with their two beautiful kids. When Leslie goes online to make business contacts, the family is besieged with mysterious threats, and Bryan is almost killed by an unknown gunman.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Friend Request
programme.desc: Megan Meier, a vulnerable 13-year old living in a small town in Missouri, turns to the internet for socialization outside of school. When she meets 16-year old Josh online, she falls in love. But this love story turns tragic as the web of lies unravels.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Flirting with the Enemy
programme.desc: College freshman Jason Rodriguez finds excitement in his newfound freedom online when he begins dating several girls who pique his interest. But soon after meeting one of them offline, he turns up dead and the identity of his online friends are revealed.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Playing Doctor
programme.desc: 24-year-old Jessika Rovell falls for Jeffrey Marsalis' charm and good looks but when she discovers his secret online life as Dr. Jeff, she realizes she's been dating a monster who stalks dating websites.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape With One Leg
programme.desc: Walter Rhodes and two other suspects were involved in the murder of two cops. Rhodes agrees to testify against the others for a lesser sentence and is eventually released. Shortly afterwards, he violates his parole but refuses to go back.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Build a Meth Lab
programme.desc: Jerry Wright built up a booming meth business in the hills of Tennessee until his lab blew up.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fall in Love With a Prison Guard
programme.desc: Terry Banks is in prison for life. When he falls for a guard named Lynette, he's determined to break free to start a life with her. She helps him escape and they go on the run. But when the FBI tracks them down, will they commit another desperate act?

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob Banks
programme.desc: Joe Loya is a professional bank robber, addicted to the adrenaline of power. After 13 months of successful robberies, Loya's luck runs out when one robbery goes wrong. It's the latest in bank technology that leads investigators to Loya and ends his spree.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Become a Neo-Nazi
programme.desc: John Ditullio beat a homeless man to death and killed a neighbour who he felt was an enemy of the white race.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Fall in Love With a Prison Guard
programme.desc: Terry Banks is in prison for life. When he falls for a guard named Lynette, he's determined to break free to start a life with her. She helps him escape and they go on the run. But when the FBI tracks them down, will they commit another desperate act?

programme.title: How the World Ends: Pandemic Pandemonium
programme.desc: History has taught us that when it comes to new viruses, humankind is still vulnerable, despite modern medicine. Meet people who are determined to survive the next global pandemic and the chaos that will ensue.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Biblical Armageddon
programme.desc: Discover the past and future of apocalyptic beliefs, the lengths people will go to ready for the end and the dark side of End Times prophecy.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Flavor Infusion
programme.desc: Alfonso has the inside information on what makes some treats so tasty, from the iconic Andes Mints to Christie's chocolate cookies. Then, see how snacks like Taffy Town's cotton candy taffy and Ole Smoky Tennessee Moonshine pack so much serious flavors.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Can't Eat Just One
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro dives into Hot Tamales and their addictive cinnamon snap, Nathan's irresistible chili cheese fries and finds out how Dum Dums lollipops got their name. Finally, he finds out about Annie Chun's flavor-packed Mini Wontons.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Savor the Flavor
programme.desc: Savor the flavor of some tasty treats, from Eli's scrumptious Bavarian Apple Tart to Necco's classic bite-size Mary Jane. Then, the mystery of the orange-colored, banana-flavored Circus Peanuts is solved.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Nostalgic Eats
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro takes your taste buds back in time to see how the classic Necco Wafers are made.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Snack Bar
programme.desc: Alfonso explores some snack bar treats, starting with cool and refreshing Junior Mints and their signature dimple. For dessert on the go, find out about Nemo's carrot cake squares and Tasty Kate's individual cherry pies.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Fruits and Veggies
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro wants you to eat your fruits and veggies; pears in your hard cider, carrots in your cookies and sweet potato fries with a satisfying crunch.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Breakfast

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Feast Over Flame

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fired-Up Chefs

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pit Masters

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Coast to Coast Cookouts

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Seafood Feast
programme.desc: Brothers Vaughn and Gary Knowles take Roger to the docks for fresh lobsters and clams for a breathtaking seafood feast. The Nisqually Tribe teaches Roger ways of preparing seafood.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is scouring the country for fiery fresh takes on the beloved classic combination, surf and turf.

programme.title: TrueSouth
programme.desc: The series takes viewers to two bedrock spots in the south and explores various cities and their environs, getting to know good people through good food.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Beaumont
programme.desc: Once a Southern institution, barbecue has become an American obsession and Texas brisket has been mainstreamed. This is a story about a scrappy onetime oil boomtown, where cooks make the most of scraps, and about two Gulf Coast dishes that have hung on.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Hodgenville
programme.desc: In the southern towns of Hodgenville and Bardstown, Kentucky, the land where Lincoln was born, conflicting ideas about identity and purpose come into focus. Onion burgers and country sausage prove constants in a time of great change.

programme.title: TrueSouth: Memphis
programme.desc: Just as there are many Souths, black Memphis reveals itself to be varied and complex and beautiful. Here, we see the streets of Memphis and its classic spots including Pop's Hot Tamales, Lee Crumb and Ms. Girlee's.

programme.title: Heartland: After the Storm
programme.desc: Heartland's future is put in jeopardy when Lou mistakenly sends Mrs. Roach's horse home before his fear of traffic is cured. Val Stanton spreads gossip. Amy has doubts about her abilities. Ty's probation officer pays a visit.

programme.title: Heartland: Breaking Free
programme.desc: In order to drum up business, Lou organizes an open house and invites their father to see Amy for the first time in ten years.

programme.title: The Inspectors: The Impostors
programme.desc: The Inspectors investigate a criminal pretending to be a military officer and lure in a potential catphish online.

programme.title: The Inspectors: Veronica Returns
programme.desc: Preston and Veronica try to figure out where they stand in their relationship when Veronica returns from studying abroad. Also, Amanda and Mitch investigate a strong of post office robberies.

programme.title: Movie: Like Mike
programme.desc: A 14-year-old orphan loves basketball and idolizes Michael Jordan. After finding a pair of sneakers with the initials 'MJ' inside, he suddenly has the ability to make superhuman jump shots and dunks just like his hero. He dreams of a big NBA career.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home of the Brave

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freeze Framed

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ultimate Betrayal

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Covet Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Olamide Elizabeth Adeyooye, a science major has been missing for 48 hrs, and her family grows increasingly concerned.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express

programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Drew Peterson: Killer Charm
programme.desc: In 2007, Stacy Peterson, the wife of veteran police sergeant Drew Peterson, goes missing. As police launch an intensive search to find her the case of the missing mother raises shocking new questions about the death of Peterson's third wife years earlier.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Did Scott Peterson Murder Laci?
programme.desc: A tale of murder, adultery, courtroom drama, and ultimately the death penalty. The story of Scott and Laci Peterson as told by those who lived it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Billboard Installer
programme.desc: Mike Rowe teams up with an outdoor advertising company in Texas that teaches the tricks of a very dirty trade.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mule Logger
programme.desc: Mike teams up with a master-cooper, also known as a barrel maker, and attempts to master the art of toasting the inside of barrels over an open flame. It is the toasting that gives the wine a special flavor while it ferments.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Date Palm Pollenator
programme.desc: Mike travels to Palm Springs where he collects pollen from male date palm pods and pollinates female trees. He also shows never before seen footage and answers viewer mail.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Chicken Busters
programme.desc: Mike spends the day working with the Chicken Busters, chasing and catching feral chickens. Then he answers a fan letter about the familial bond often rooted within the jobs he works.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Worm Grunter
programme.desc: Mike heads out to Florida to harvest some clams and then takes on some worm grunting in the Apalachicola National Forest.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Animal Barber
programme.desc: Mike Rowe and the crew travel to the Spring Brook Ranch in Kalispell, Montana to join forces with a yak and bison rancher who put him to work.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Dirty Jobs of the Big Apple
programme.desc: Mike gets dirty in the Big Apple after climbing atop a building to clean the water tower.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Reindeer Farm
programme.desc: Mike heads to Kentucky to try shrink wrapping a houseboat, and then he heads off to Alaska to spend the day at a reindeer farm.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sewer Inspector
programme.desc: Mike joins a sewer inspector on patrol, braving the cockroach and rat-infested sewers of San Francisco. Then he helps a disaster clean-up crew after a Brooklyn toilet explodes from sewer backup and does some backbreaking work at a demolition company.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Turkey Farmer
programme.desc: Mike examines the short lives of turkeys as they make their way from farm to sandwich. Then, it's off to a potato farm, where Mike digs in the dirt for colourful taters that will revolutionize fries. He removes sewage from a water treatment plant as well.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Hoof Cleaner
programme.desc: Joining a crew at a rock query, Mike Rowe gets hip deep in mud and muck working with the hippo keepers at the Adventure Aquarium. Mike also gets the opportunity to address some bovine foot problems.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Welcome to Treasure Island
programme.desc: Twelve ordinary people must figure out how to survive on an uninhabited island. with just a few tools and a day's supply of water.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: Firefighters survive a massive explosion, warheads explode in a Korean tunnel, an avalanche buries a city in Norway, a 100-foot crane collapse narrowly misses workers, and a racecar snaps in half at 310 miles per hour.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: American Original
programme.desc: The bass are biting in Oklahoma.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Dry Tortugas, FL Keys - Light Tackle/Huge Bottom Fish
programme.desc: Light spin tackle for oversized bottom fish off the Dry Tortugas.

programme.title: Local Knowledge: A Day In The Life
programme.desc: On a typical day of Ali and Rush, Rush preps for the season, and Ali rounds up a friend to check local hot spots.

programme.title: Into the Blue: Tuna Time
programme.desc: Scott and Steve search for big tuna.

programme.title: Saltwater Experience: Cuda on the Rubble Pile
programme.desc: The captains take advantage of limited time and make a short trip to a nearby man-mad haven for the ferocious barracuda.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: No Sancocho Sailfish Shootout
programme.desc: Rick is at a billfish tournament at Casa Vieja Lodge in Guatemala.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Legend of the Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Josh heads to the jungles of Central America to investigate the legendary crystal skull that was discovered by a renowned adventurer who was the inspiration for Indiana Jones. Josh probes whether the skull is a lost relic or archaeology's tallest tale.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Josh follows in the footsteps of Indiana Jones as he searches in Israel and Ethiopia for the lost Ark of the Covenant, the sacred relic said to contain the Ten Commandments and possess extraordinary powers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Josh travels to the remote and landmine-riddled jungles of Cambodia to investigate the lost city of the Khmer Empire and search for a mystical relic that over 1,000 years ago gave its God King the power to incinerate his enemies.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Quest for King Arthur
programme.desc: Josh scours England, Wales, and Scotland to find the real life King Arthur.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Cracking the D.B. Cooper Case
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets off on an expedition to crack the mystery behind the perpetrator of the only unsolved plane hijacking in US history.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Captain Kidd's Treasure
programme.desc: Josh retraces the footsteps of the legendary Captain Kidd in the hopes of finding his buried treasure. From the East Coast to the Caribbean, the search takes him to a real pirate shipwreck and to the island hideout of the notorious buccaneer.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Fire on the Mountain
programme.desc: Avid outdoorsman Trenton and novice survivalist Jen take on high elevation in the peaks of Udhampur, India. With relentlessly cold nights and an unexpected wildfire, their chances of surviving the 21-day challenge might go up in flames.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dunes of Despair
programme.desc: A laid back wilderness instructor and his go-getter 'wild child' survival mate are dropped onto the sun-scorched, desolate sand dunes of Brazil. In this bleak landscape of blinding white sand, they battle hunger, dehydration and, ultimately, each other.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Prison of Garbage
programme.desc: Deborah and Mary both started hoarding in the wake of a personal tragedy. After Deborah killed her drug-addicted boyfriend in self-defence, she and her son have lived amid growing piles of trash and unused possessions.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Nowhere Near Normal
programme.desc: Extreme Hoarder Jahn struggles to clear her belongings from two houses before both are condemned.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: My Teeth Are Lost in the Pile
programme.desc: When Kyle first met Lynn, he thought she was the answer to all of his problems, but years later, she's transformed his home into a heap of trash. Now on the verge of foreclosure, the couple will either get along enough to clean, or kill each other trying.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: It's My Junk
programme.desc: When Eileen admits a dark secret to her family, the situation quickly escalates beyond hoarding to a matter of life and death. Compulsive hoarder Dale has packed not one, but five houses full of clutter.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: She's Going to Jail
programme.desc: Joanne's hoarding is so extreme that the city has already sent her to jail four times.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Leading a Double Life
programme.desc: A family suffers the effects of mould, mice and flea infestations because their upstairs neighbor and landlord has acquired one of the show's most massive hoards to date.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: This Is Unreal
programme.desc: After losing his mother, Milton's shopping became a compulsion that soon took over his life.

programme.title: Movie: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Genetically re-created dinosaurs break out of captivity and wreak havoc in a theme park.

programme.title: Movie: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Dr. Ian Malcolm follows his girlfriend to an island inhabited by dinosaurs to study them in their natural habitat. Disaster strikes and the group find themselves in the ultimate fight for survival.

programme.title: Movie: Jurassic Park III
programme.desc: A wealthy couple's son goes missing on a remote island full of dinosaurs. The couple tricks a paleontologist into going back and helping them find their son, but things don't go according to plan.

programme.title: Movie: Office Space
programme.desc: A computer programmer's sudden professional nonchalance leads to bizarre success.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Leslie tries to convince Chris and Ben to give the parks department more money, but when she fails to persuade them, she enlists Ann's help. Meanwhile, Ron and Andy coach youth basketball.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Flu Season
programme.desc: While planning for a local festival, Leslie is struck hard with the flu and ends up in the hospital.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Time Capsule
programme.desc: Leslie wants to bury a time capsule that showcases life in Pawnee, but is thrown off by an odd suggestion.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ron and Tammy: Part Two
programme.desc: Tom tries to get back at Ron by going on a date with his ex-wife, Tammy. Leslie tries to prevent Ron from falling for Tammy's charming ways.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Media Blitz
programme.desc: Leslie does a series of interviews while trying to get the word out about the Harvest Festival. A media storm ensues when Ben has to answer questions about his past as a teen mayor.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Indianapolis
programme.desc: Leslie and Ron head to Indianapolis to receive a commendation for the upcoming Harvest Festival.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Harvest Festival
programme.desc: With the fate of her entire department hinging on the success of Harvest Festival, Leslie must deal with last-minute problems including a tribal leader who is threatening to put a curse on the entire event.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Camping
programme.desc: Leslie takes the whole department camping in order to brainstorm new ideas.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Fancy Party
programme.desc: Andy and April host a dinner party for all of their friends; Ben asks Leslie for some career advice.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Soulmates
programme.desc: Ann convinces Leslie to sign up for an online dating service, only to be matched with someone she already knows.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Jerry's Painting
programme.desc: Jerry's contribution to Leslie's community arts show causes a stir. Ben moves in with April and Andy in order to teach them how to behave like adults.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Eagleton
programme.desc: When the neighbouring city of Eagleton erects a fence around one of their parks, Leslie must get her former best friend to take it down.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Fight
programme.desc: When Leslie tries to get Anne a job at City Hall, Anne's lukewarm reaction causes their first fight. Tom invites the entire department to the Snakehole Lounge to promote his new drink.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Road Trip
programme.desc: When Chris sends Leslie and Ben to Indianapolis, Leslie is worried she will make a move on Ben. Ron teaches a young student about his views on government.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Bubble
programme.desc: Everyone in the office is unhappy when Chris decides to make some big changes in the parks department.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Li'l Sebastian
programme.desc: Leslie and the parks team put together a memorial service for a dearly departed friend. Meanwhile, Tom makes a big life decision.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: I'm Leslie Knope
programme.desc: Leslie must choose to either break up with Ben or follow her dream of running for office. Ann is forced to make an unexpected diagnosis.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ron and Tammys
programme.desc: Leslie is forced to intervene when Tammy One re-enters Ron's life and begins controlling his every move.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Born and Raised
programme.desc: Leslie falls prey to some 'gotcha' journalism while promoting her new book. Ann is determined to bond with Ron and April.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Pawnee Rangers
programme.desc: In an effort to protest the inequality of Ron's boys-only trip, Leslie takes the girls on a trip of their own.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Meet N' Greet
programme.desc: Andy and April decide to throw a Halloween party at their house, which upsets Ben.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: End of the World
programme.desc: A local Pawnee group predicts that the end of the world is coming, causing Leslie and the others to contemplate their lives.

programme.title: Movie: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Genetically re-created dinosaurs break out of captivity and wreak havoc in a theme park.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Triple D Takes On Triple G ... Again!
programme.desc: Creating the ultimate diner dish should be easy for Triple D chefs, but a strict weight limit on ingredients makes this challenge heavy duty. Then, who has time to figure out what Guy's favorite dish is when you only get a few minutes to shop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sicilian and Seafood
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from incredible Italian to sensational seafood. In Oklahoma City, a funky food truck putting out wood-fired pizza and grandma's Sicilian meatball recipe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ Road Show
programme.desc: Guy is tucking in the napkin and getting into some righteous barbecue. In Dallas, the barbecue stand tucked into a farmers' market is dishing out classic beef brisket and Carolina pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: College-Town Champs
programme.desc: Guy visits Columbus, Ohio for pierogies and a barbeque truck and Boulder, Colorado for noodles and chicken from a Thai restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Favorites With a Twist
programme.desc: Guy visits places with a new take on old favourites such as a huge caramel pecan roll.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Ocean Coasts and Great Lakes
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from coast to coast and to the Great Lakes to dig up some dynamite dishes. In Los Angeles, a Mexican joint in Grand Central Market serves outrageous octopus tostadas and puts a lights-out spin on a burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seafood and Sammies
programme.desc: A food truck shuckin' and frying oysters for a po boy in Vancouver.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burger and Breakfast
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from breakfast to burgers. In Vancouver, British Columbia, a pie shop bakin' up both sweet and savory sensations. In Chico, California, a morning hot spot pumping up French toast and spicing up potatoes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Style
programme.desc: Two Providence brothers create new family classics including BBQ chicken-stuffed ravioli.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh, Filled and Fried
programme.desc: Guy crosses the country looking for scratch cooking done right, including fried empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Barbecued, Baked and Brined
programme.desc: Guy visits three joints doing scratch cooking their way.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: You Found 'Em
programme.desc: Guy goes to a drive-in in Kentucky that's serving the same burgers as they did in 1951.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Quirky Classics
programme.desc: Guy enjoys some one-of-a-kind meals like cajun oysters Rockefeller and burgers slathered with a remoulade called goo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Their Own Way
programme.desc: Guy meets cooks doing things their own way in Flagstaff Arizona.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Whole Lotta Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri dives into hearty helpings of comfort starting with a soul food spot dishing out Southern seafood and killer fried chicken in Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast, West Coast
programme.desc: Guy visits a California joint to try spicy pork and knockout gnocchi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavor Adventure
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a culinary trip filled with adventurous flavour. In Los Angeles, a funky spot is all about filling bowls with eclectic eats. In Norfolk, Virginia, a market and restaurant has Mexican specialties that you probably haven't seen before.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Spicy to Icy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's heating up with some spice and cooling off with some ice. In Palm Springs, Calif., a barbecue joint pilin' up the meats and firin' up their 'flamethrower.'

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Brisket to Bison
programme.desc: It's all about the meat as Guy Fieri crosses the country to stop at some of his favorite haunts. In Denver, a Native American eatery has a new way to serve bison, and a Nashville diner is taking lamb to the next level. Plus, Guy snoops around Yellowstone.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Stuffed Stuff
programme.desc: Guy Fieri knows it's what's on the inside that counts and these top spots in the Triple D Nation really know how to stuff the good stuff in. Like in Eureka, Calif., where a chef is cramming calamari with shrimp and leeks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Between The Bread
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's always down for a good sandwich, so he's stopping in to check out some of the Triple D Nation's latest creations. A food truck in Nashville put down roots and started churning out cheesy concoctions.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Family Fun Day
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis hosts a fun and cost-effective family celebration complete with simple outdoor games and a menu that appeals to both the little ones and the grown-ups. Recipes include juicy Lucy slider bar and crispy potato nests.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bobby Loves Biscuits
programme.desc: This bicuit bonanza includes biscuit French toast with cinnamon orange cane syrup, chilled bourbon vanilla latte, ham, tomato and cheddar sandwiches, and a doughnut with lemon cream filling and blueberry sauce.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Liquor Store Secrets
programme.desc: Ina's unlocking her liquor store secrets and easy techniques that take red wine-braised short ribs, fennel soup gratin and an awesome fresh apple spice cake to the next level.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Tom's Hometown Favorites
programme.desc: Valerie surprises her Midwestern husband Tom with some of his Ohio favorites. Ohio turkey chili, fried bologna bites with pickled squash, tomato and bibb lettuce salad and vanilla and coffee cream puffs are all on the menu.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Well Done, Dad
programme.desc: Ree brings her dad a celebration meal with all of his favorite foods. A luxurious, slow-cooked burgundy beef stew, creamy cheese grits casserole and super-tasty blistered green beans.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Two Ranchers and Ree
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making lunch for two of her favourite ranchers, her husband, Ladd, and his dad, Chuck. She starts with her father-in-law's favorite, Chuck's Shrimp Brochettes, and the aptly named Greatest Quesadillas.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Dinner for Dad
programme.desc: Ree's home alone and throwing an impromptu dinner party for her dad and stepmom. She's making her dad's favorites including steak Oscar and roasted asparagus.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home Part 5
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is whipping up fantastic five-ingredient dishes with the help of her kid film crew. Her husband, Ladd, shares his input as she makes fast and fabulous Bruschetta Chicken, a spin on a favorite appetizer.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Insane Salads
programme.desc: Molly shares insane salads including individual candy bar salads that will blow your dessert mind and a juicy steak salad with Za'atar chimichurri. She also creates two make-ahead salads including one that's eight layers high.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: The Bertinelli Boys Are Back in Town
programme.desc: Valerie is refreshing classic diner fare in a meal for her brothers, David and Patrick, and her nephew, Enzo.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Burger Bash
programme.desc: Guy Fieri challenges his talented chef friends to take a burger beyond the basic patty and bun. Antonia Lofaso combines sirloin and brisket with braised oxtail for an intensely meaty burger and whips orange juice for a crisp Garibaldi cocktail.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Dad's Sticky Ribs and Decadent Cookies
programme.desc: Michael turns the backyard grill into a smoker to make his dad's favourite sticky ribs. Then, he makes grilled potato salad as his wife turns his dad's obsession with chocolate into giant cookies infuses with chocolate, crunchy pretzel and sea salt.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Dishes for Dad
programme.desc: The Kitchen is celebrating dads everywhere pop-pleasing dishes like Sunny's pulled pork eggs benedict and Katie Lee's breakfast sausage eggs and cheeseburgers. Jeff's father, Gus Mauro, stops by to help make cheesesteak tacos. The host share gift ideas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Heroes
programme.desc: Guy us diving deep into beloved neighborhoods across the country to check out some local hot spots.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Southern Spectacular
programme.desc: Guy is celebrating southern home cooking from collards and grits in South Carolina to homemade biscuits in Oregon.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Flavor Faves
programme.desc: Check out some of Guy's favourite spots serving up all kinds of traditional ethnic dishes including hand-pulled Chinese noodles from Peaceful Restaurant, to quesadillas and tortas at Nopalito, and Guamanian classics at PDX 671.
