programme.title: Two and a Half Men: On Vodka, on Soda, on Blender, on Mixer!
programme.desc: Walden helps Jenny get a second date with a one-night stand. Alan receives a Japanese delicacy from Jake for Christmas, and Walden's Malibu house is alive with questionable Christmas carol lyrics.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tazed in the Lady Nuts
programme.desc: Walden joins his beautiful former employee on a brilliant new project. Meanwhile, Alan advises Jenny to open up to her girlfriend or risk losing her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bite Me, Supreme Court
programme.desc: Walden and Alan throw Marty a bachelor party after he proposes to Evelyn, and his best friends help him celebrate his last days of bachelorhood.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Bite Me, Supreme Court
programme.desc: Walden and Alan throw Marty a bachelor party after he proposes to Evelyn, and his best friends help him celebrate his last days of bachelorhood.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Three Fingers of Crème de Menthe
programme.desc: Alan learns that Lyndsey broke up with Larry and didn't tell him. Meanwhile, Walden sets out to prove that he's a man's man.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: How to Get Rid of Alan Harper
programme.desc: Walden suspects his new girlfriend is cheating on him. Meanwhile, Alan gets even more intertwined in Lyndsey and Larry's relationship when he starts dating Larry's sister, Gretchen.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Welcome Home, Jake
programme.desc: Lyndsey discovers that Alan is sleeping with Larry's sister, Gretchen. Meanwhile, Walden struggles with telling Barry to find his own place.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: West Side Story
programme.desc: Walden gets an invitation to his ex-girlfriends' boutique opening. Meanwhile, Gretchen wants to spend more time at Alan's house.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Lan Mao Shi Zai Wuding Shang
programme.desc: Walden reconnects with Kate and is sure she's 'the one' that is, until he meets Vivian and becomes convinced she's 'the one.' Meanwhile, Alan and Gretchen grow closer.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Lotta Delis in Little Armenia
programme.desc: Alan stumbles upon an opportunity to make money. Meanwhile, Walden has to address his co-dependency issues.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Dial 1-900-MIX-A-LOT
programme.desc: Alan's girlfriend insists he confess his true identity to Larry, and Walden goes on a road trip with Jenny and Barry.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Oh, WALD-E, Good Times Ahead
programme.desc: Alan confesses his true identity to Larry and has to face the consequences.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Ol' Mexican Spinach
programme.desc: Following a health scare on Halloween, Walden decides to reprioritize his life with Alan's help.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Chic Bar in Ibiza
programme.desc: When Walden asks Alan to sign a pre-nup, Alan gets offended and has second thoughts about getting married.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Glamping in a Yurt
programme.desc: Alan and Walden have a meeting with an adoption social worker that hinges on them being convincing as a loving couple. Meanwhile, Lyndsey returns after 60 days in rehab.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Thirty-Eight, Sixty-Two, Thirty-Eight
programme.desc: Walden and Alan meet a birth mother who's considering them to adopt her baby.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Oontz. Oontz. Oontz
programme.desc: Walden decides to foster a six-year-old boy but begins to doubt himself when they don't bond like he expected.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Shot a Little Girl
programme.desc: When Alan realizes Louis thinks he's cool, he starts breaking Walden's rules in order to keep it that way.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sex With An Animated Ed Asner
programme.desc: Alan and Walden befriend three moms at a kids' gym but things get complicated when Walden becomes attracted to one of them. Meanwhile, Alan goes out for a girls' night with a group of moms.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Family, Bublé, Deep-Fried Turkey
programme.desc: Walden and Alan are determined to convince their foster child, Louis, that Santa Claus is real.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: I Love What You Do for Me
programme.desc: Max offers to help Christine make a major life change after she realizes that her five-year car lease is up and her life hasn't evolved in all that time.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Scream
programme.desc: A good-looking cop, who Old Christine assumes is a stripper, alerts her there is a prowler in the neighbourhood, she convinces Matthew to stay over. New Christine goes into labour on Old Christine's birthday.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Get Smarter
programme.desc: Christine has Matthew and Barb throw her a 'surprise' engagement party so she can get to know Max's friends. She begins to feel intellectually inferior to one particular guest and makes a surprising decision.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Pilot
programme.desc: Christine's 8-year-old son, Ritchie has been accepted into a posh private school where Christine encounters two snooty class moms, Marly and Lindsay, who seem unable to grasp the concept that Christine actually works.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Supertramp
programme.desc: When Christine learns that Richard and new Christine are enjoying an intimate relationship, she becomes determined to make her own conquests. After several failed attempts to meet eligible men, she finally runs into a guy named Stan at the grocery store.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Open Water
programme.desc: When Christine learns that her close friends, Barb and Pete, are responsible for introducing Richard to his new girlfriend named Christine, she allows them to set her up on a blind date of her own. Meanwhile, Matthew takes Ritchie to swimming lessons.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All That Jazz
programme.desc: Dorothy's son shows up, jobless and wifeless, and wanting to be a free spirit.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Not Another Monday
programme.desc: Sophia's friend has come up with an idea that will change her life. She wants to commit suicide and she wants Sophia there to hold her hand.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Old Feeling
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her brother in-law and is taken back by his resemblance to her deceased husband. She quickly finds herself falling in love with hopes of marriage.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Comedy of Errors
programme.desc: Dorothy wants to fulfill her ambition to become a stand-up comic.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebb Tide
programme.desc: Dorothy accompanies Blanche to Atlanta for Big Daddy's funeral.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Mary Has a Little Lamb
programme.desc: Dorothy aids a pregnant and unwed teen who was rejected by her father.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Great Expectations
programme.desc: Rose is touting the power of positive thinking; Blanche's beau has a heart attack.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Triple Play

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Clinton Avenue Memoirs
programme.desc: After digging out the family album, Sophia wants to visit their old home in Brooklyn.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Like the Beep Beep of the Tom-Tom
programme.desc: Blanche knows she needs a pacemaker, but she fears it'll halt her sex life.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: An Illegitimate Concern
programme.desc: A young man identifies himself as the illegitimate son of Blanche's late husband George.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: 72 Hours

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Twice in a Lifetime
programme.desc: Rose briefly rekindles a romance she had with Buzz Mueller, but realizes she loves Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sisters and Other Strangers
programme.desc: Blanche is dumbfounded to discover that her sister, Charmaine, has written a novel.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Cheaters
programme.desc: Dorothy surprises herself and her housemates by having a relationship with a married man.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Mangiacavallo Curse Makes a Lousy Wedding Present
programme.desc: Sophia disrupts a wedding celebration by saying that she cursed the groom's grandfather.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All Bets Are Off
programme.desc: Dorothy risks everything when she lets her gambling problem get out of control.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche Delivers
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter wants to give birth in a birthing center while Blanche is preoccupied by the possibility of Rebecca delivering in a local hospital. Blanche doesn't want to be embarrassed by the fact that her daughter was artificially inseminated.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Once in St. Olaf
programme.desc: Rose makes a stunning discovery while admitting a patient at the hospital. Meanwhile, Sophia has to have surgery, but a mix-up occurs after the operation and Sophia becomes lost in the hospital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: If at Last You Do Succeed
programme.desc: Stan has finally hit it big with a new invention, but still Dorothy can't be happy for him. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche fight over some war bonds that, if cashed, could bankrupt St. Olaf.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Warthog Named Peaches
programme.desc: Peaches, a two-month-old warthog, charms his keepers while training to become an animal ambassador. A nervous one-horned rhino adjusts to her new exhibit. Plus, Willow, a red panda, shows signs of being pregnant.

programme.title: The Zoo: Velcro the Incredible
programme.desc: An okapi called Magani is ready to breed and is paired with veteran Kweli to learn the ropes. Lola the blue iguana plays hard-to-get when introduced to a potential mate, and anteater Velcro shows off her talents with a new tool.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx Tales: A Rare Egg
programme.desc: It's a series of firsts when the Central Park Zoo welcomes its first-ever Atlantic puffin chick. A rhino called Penny undergoes a series of allergy tests, while an endangered species of gecko welcomes her first hatchling.

programme.title: The Zoo: Great Snakes!
programme.desc: After more than 100 venomous snakes are taken from a private home, it's up to the zoo to care for them. Two Pronghorn fawns make their debut, but problems arise that have keepers concerned, while a device is built for a Red River hog needing a challenge.

programme.title: Saved By the Barn: Hog Chase Rescue
programme.desc: Dan races to North Carolina to rescue a group of pigs from horrific living conditions and discovers that one of the pigs is pregnant. Later, the organization's new sign is displayed, making their transformation official.

programme.title: The Great American Groom-A-Long
programme.desc: Carson Kressley pairs dog-grooming professionals with friends and celebs such as Apolo Ohno, Dennis Quaid and Aubrey O'Day. Together, they and the rest of America learn how to transform shaggy canines into fabulous pooches, despite being stuck at home.

programme.title: The Zoo: Mending Willow
programme.desc: One team tests the problem solving skills of lions against those of snow leopards. Willow, a young red panda, is having mysterious foot problems. Also, the bird department anxiously awaits the gender reveal of two new adjutant stork chicks.

programme.title: Saved By the Barn: Hog Chase Rescue
programme.desc: Dan races to North Carolina to rescue a group of pigs from horrific living conditions and discovers that one of the pigs is pregnant. Later, the organization's new sign is displayed, making their transformation official.

programme.title: The Great American Groom-A-Long

programme.title: The Zoo: Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: The future of the American bison depends on a high-stakes race across the country. The reptile staff have their hands full with a diamond rattlesnake that needs to be medicated orally. A pair of cheetahs is trained to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Great Snakes!
programme.desc: After more than 100 venomous snakes are taken from a private home, it's up to the zoo to care for them. Two Pronghorn fawns make their debut, but problems arise that have keepers concerned, while a device is built for a Red River hog needing a challenge.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In the Thick of It
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer Canfield looks for the owner of a frozen fishing line while Major Juneau takes command of a mountain rescue. Officer McKee runs radar for snowmobiles. And Officer Cyrs checks on a moose in a bog.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Towne get more than they bargained for with a speeding snowmobiler. The K-9 unit performs winter training. Officer MacFadzen patrols an ice drag racing event. Then, Officer Cyrs heads into the woods to investigate a hit and run.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Raccoon Rescue
programme.desc: With the help of local police, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett remove campers found illegally occupying state property. An 8-year-old boy is found riding solo on an ATV, and Officer Crouse helps two raccoon cubs found on the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Treacherous Trails
programme.desc: During a busy winter weekend, Lt. Boudreau encounters kite skiers, an illegal fire sled and a vandalized bob-house. Officer Canfield searches for a deer with an arrow in its head. Then, Officers Demler and Towne head our on a mountain rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Last Days of Winter
programme.desc: The dive team assists at an event in Hampton Beach, while Officer Courtney patrols the area's clam flats. Officers Hannett and Holmes patrol snowmobile activity across the state. And Officer Demler helps a bobcat that's been injured by a porcupine.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Officer Crouse responds to a call about a nuisance raccoon, while Officer Towne searches for a deer attacked by coyotes. Officer Hannett monitors a suspicious fisherman and Officer St. Pierre responds to a call about an impaired driver.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Riverside Stakeout
programme.desc: Nature lovers show up for Discover Wild New Hampshire Day. Officers conduct an undercover surveillance. Officer McKee rescues a starving owl from the side of the road. Later on, Mount Monadnock, a perilous rescue of an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Loose
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau teams up with trainee Masucci to track down a turkey hunter who may have shot from the road. When an animal release goes south, Officer Hannett lends a hand. Then, Officer Canfield races to catch a trespassing dirt biker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre, Benvenuti and K9 Cora investigate a couple accused of road hunting. An actress tries to perform her way out of a ticket with Officer Hannett. Officer Holmes gets an injured goose call and Officer Frye handles a neighbor dispute.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Out of Options
programme.desc: Officer Cyrs gets a call about a rabid fox that attacked a homeowner. Officer Crouse tracks down a group of ATV riders. Lt. Murphy talks to a farmer about a nuisance bear. Officers Frye and Jones investigate a hunter that may have shot from the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bump in the Road
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett have an unusually busy day on ATV patrol. Officer McDermott investigates a man who illegally shot a rabbit in a residential area. Officers Holmes and Cyrs use ATVs to rescue an injured hiker on Mount Carter.

programme.title: House of Payne: Can I Get a Witness?
programme.desc: Ella learns that she has a lump in her breast. Meanwhile, Calvin thinks he has to go into the witness protection program.

programme.title: House of Payne: Commencement Day
programme.desc: Calvin finds out that he's graduating from college and tells everyone and later learns that the school made a mistake.

programme.title: House of Payne: A Shock to the System
programme.desc: Kevin, a friend of Malik's, is hit by a car while staying over at the Payne's and Malik has to deal with the possibility of losing his friend. Meanwhile, Calvin gets a job and then gets fired.

programme.title: Martin: Kill Him with Kindness
programme.desc: Martin thinks Gina wants to kill him for life insurance money.

programme.title: Martin: Blow, Baby, Blow
programme.desc: When music producer Biggie Smalls comes to town, everybody wants to be a star.

programme.title: Martin: Ring a Ding, Ding, Ding Gone
programme.desc: Martin takes off his wedding ring when his pals complain that it scares off women, but he's the frightened one when he has to explain its loss to Gina.

programme.title: Martin: Love T.K.O.
programme.desc: Martin and Gina's romantic weekend gets interrupted by everyone else's love woes.

programme.title: Black-ish: Rock, Paper, Scissors, Gun
programme.desc: After a break-in down the block, Dre talks about getting a gun, but Bow is not comfortable with the idea, which leads everyone to debate the many different ways to protect your family.

programme.title: Black-ish: Dr. Hell No
programme.desc: After Dre gets his yearly physical and comes home traumatized, Pops explains his generation's strong aversion towards healthcare and admits that he hasn't seen a doctor in years.

programme.title: Black-ish: Daddy's Day
programme.desc: After another lackluster Father's Day overshadowed by graduation parties and summer vacations, Dre and his colleagues decide to come up with a holiday initiative entitled 'Daddy's Day,' celebrating everything that Father's Day is not.

programme.title: Black-ish: Churched
programme.desc: In the Johnson home, Sundays involve SAT prep and sports, so when the family is invited to Church on Sunday by the neighbours, Dre goes against his instinct of always saying 'no' and agrees.

programme.title: Black-ish: Jacked o' Lantern
programme.desc: Ever since he was a kid, Dre has loved Halloween. Now that he lives in one of those 'good candy neighborhoods,' kids come from all over the city to trick-or-treat, including Dre’s own nieces and nephews.

programme.title: Black-ish: Charlie in Charge
programme.desc: While Dre and Bow take Zoey on a trip to visit Bow's alma mater, Brown University, Dre battles with his fear of flying through a little pharmaceutical assistance to get him through the flight.

programme.title: Black-ish: Chop Shop
programme.desc: While Bow prepares for the Johnson family's annual Christmas card shoot, Dre takes Junior and Jack to the Barber Shop to get a haircut from his lifelong Barber, T.

programme.title: Black-ish: Man at Work
programme.desc: Dre has always looked out for the crew he grew up with, but when his childhood friend Sha comes to stay at the house for a few days, Bow thinks he is taking advantage of Dre's generosity.

programme.title: Black-ish: Road to a Championship
programme.desc: Dre thinks Christmas has become commercialized and is all about 'stuff,' and no one loves 'stuff' more than his kids. Pops thinks they have forgotten the true meaning of Christmas and comes up with a new plan.

programme.title: Black-ish: Plus Two Isn't a Thing
programme.desc: Dre's childhood best friend Gigi Franklin is in town, and Bow feels like an afterthought whenever the two of them are together. Dre and Gigi are like brother and sister, but it doesn’t help that Gigi is an international pop star with model looks.

programme.title: Movie: The Fifth Element
programme.desc: A cab driver is pulled back into a military mission by a former superior to protect a mysterious woman who holds the key to saving Earth. Together, they retrieve four stones that represent the elements in order to stop an entity of pure evil.

programme.title: Movie: Speed
programme.desc: A mad bomber rigs an L.A. bus to blow if it drops below 50 m.p.h. and a police officer must rescue the commuters trapped inside.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick
programme.desc: An ex-hit man awakens one night to find his home invaded by members of the Russian mob, who beat him, steal his car and kill his beloved dog. With the most important thing in his life taken away from him, he comes out of retirement to exact vengeance.

programme.title: Futurama: The Butterjunk Effect
programme.desc: Amy and Leela join the sport of Butterfly Derby and soon get addicted to 'nectar', a natural substance that boosts their performance.

programme.title: Futurama: The Six Million Dollar Mon
programme.desc: Tire of being surrounded by robots, Hermes decides to upgrade himself by adding might mechanical body parts.

programme.title: Gary and His Demons: Gary and His Love Life
programme.desc: The anniversary of his fiancée’s death has Gary more down in the dumps than usual, but a chance encounter with a friend may be just what the doctor ordered...or not.

programme.desc: Now single, Havoc finds some joy on his new submarine until Brock shows up to ask a favor.

programme.desc: Fry is the victim of a sausage-making accident.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep

programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Serengeti
programme.desc: Take a peek at one of the most famous habitats on Earth the Serengeti. This vast grassland is home to some of the greatest concentrations of herbivores in Africa.

programme.title: Chimps of the Lost Gorge
programme.desc: A family lives in a deep, ancient forested gorge in Uganda, that runs through Africa's savannah, of which has been cut off from the rest of the jungle for 15 years.

programme.title: Madagascar: Island of Marvels
programme.desc: Examine clues from Madagascar's animals, plants and landscape to discover how the island's past has produced its present; the Tsingy have cut off animals in isolated gorges allowing them to evolve unique species.

programme.title: Madagascar: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: The narrow eastern strip of the island is rich in life; travel from the highest mountains, where trees are few, to lush rainforests, to the tropical coast, home to ring-tailed lemurs, jewelled geckos and predatory wasps.

programme.title: Madagascar: Land of Heat and Dust
programme.desc: Some of the strategies for survival in Madagascar's dry south are ingenious.

programme.desc: A member of an FBI antiterrorist team trades faces with a convicted criminal.

programme.desc: A man tries to piece together his identity after learning that his memories are false. He travels to Mars and becomes involved in a revolution to overthrow the corrupt Governor of the planet and liberate an alien artifact.

programme.title: Borneo's Secret Kingdom: Forest of the Flying Snakes
programme.desc: The Kinabatangan River is a powerhouse of nature flowing from the heart of Borneo. Fuelled by yearly monsoons, it courses through a hub of diversity.

programme.title: Borneo's Secret Kingdom: King of the Swamp
programme.desc: Borneo’s Kinabatangan River drives life to its limits with its powerful forces.

programme.title: Wild Sri Lanka: Sea of Giants
programme.desc: Dive beneath the water’s surface in Sri Lanka and discover the world beneath.

programme.title: Wild Sri Lanka: Wake of the Leopard
programme.desc: Explore Sri Lanka’s southern plains where leopards grow bigger than anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Wild Sri Lanka: Monkey in the Clouds
programme.desc: Sri Lanka’s forests rise above the rest of the country and are home to unique species'.

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Hidden Tiger
programme.desc: In the jungles of Phu Khieo live some unusual primates. Phayres leaf monkeys live up to their name eating the leaves of around a hundred different types of plant.

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Elephant Forest
programme.desc: In Central Thailands forests, fertile plains and even city streets, nature finds a way of living alongside people.

programme.title: Wild Thailand: Monkey Kingdom
programme.desc: Southern Thailand is a place of both spectacular natural beauty and unexpected surprise - where spirituality pervades every bit of life. For the animals that live here, this is a natural wonderland.

programme.title: Untamed Philippines: Wild Paradise
programme.desc: Moving from turtles of the Palawan coast to the unique National Marine Park at Tubbataha, to meet giants, whale sharks and manta rays. Also, meet a man who has done much to help the Philippine Tarsier.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under: Oh Rhi-No You Don't!
programme.desc: For the first time in ten years, Taronga vets get up close to a silverback gorilla.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Chernobyl's Doomsday Beasts
programme.desc: Bizarre markings are observed from space in oceans and deserts across the planet. Strange sightings point to conspiracies that could have global repercussions.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gateway to Eden
programme.desc: A buried monument offers new evidence about one of the Bible's greatest mysteries. A giant ominous shadow engulfs the Pacific Ocean. Scientists have trouble explaining a strange lake that's shaped like a perfect circle, and is home to otherworldly life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Monster Graveyard
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts have discovered a monster graveyard, and this groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Minotaur's Lair
programme.desc: A strange lake in Transylvania is the home of an abandoned village, and a terrifying secret. When an labyrinth is discovered on an island once home to an ancient Greek civilization, experts investigate if it was the legendary home of the Minotaur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gateway to Eden

programme.desc: When two teenage girls fall in love, their hedonistic lifestyle is played out on social media for all to see. Behind the façade, petty jealousies and insecurities escalate until finally the pressure erupts in a frenzy of shocking violence.

programme.title: Web of Lies: People You May Know
programme.desc: Single mom Lorianna Parker is excited when she meets popular good-looking Corey Davis online, and filled with hope as their friendship blossoms. But when she goes to meet him in the flesh, her dream date turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Betrayed: Murder in the Mortuary

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: A Killer Unveiled
programme.desc: September 9, 2002. Husband and father, Tom Bragg, is found brutally murdered. A kind and well-liked man, his community struggles to think who wanted him dead. But when police take a closer look at his life and relationships, a deadly picture emerges.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Candy Run
programme.desc: A family's nightmare begins in September 2014 when 8-year-old Hiawayi Robinson leaves her apartment to play but never returns. The desperate search to find her leads investigators to surveillance footage that sends shockwaves through the community.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Terror After Midnight
programme.desc: A young Hollywood celebrity is out celebrating her birthday, and another young woman enjoys a late drink with friends. Just a few hours later, they both end up dead.

programme.desc: September 9, 2002. Husband and father, Tom Bragg, is found brutally murdered. A kind and well-liked man, his community struggles to think who wanted him dead. But when police take a closer look at his life and relationships, a deadly picture emerges.

programme.desc: Julie Bowling stares down death every day as a cancer therapist and part-time funeral home worker. When she's killed while her husband is out of town, the focus turns to his secret life and shaky finances.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Gone in the Night
programme.desc: A couple wakes up to find their baby's crib empty. They are certain she has been kidnapped. But many believe the parents are the culprits.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: She was the bright, bubbly cheerleader. He was the football star. Teen sweethearts whose on-again, off-again relationship would end when one of them was found murdered.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Investigates: My Father BTK
programme.desc: A serial killer who escapes justice for 30 years. The community that never forgets. The law enforcement officers who set the trap to catch him, and his daughter who tells of the father she knew and the heartbreaking realization he was the BTK killer.

programme.title: Family Man, Family Murderer: An ID Murder Mystery
programme.desc: When pregnant Colorado mom, Shanann Watts and her two daughters vanish without a trace, her husband Chris pleads for his family's safe return. But as the investigation digs deeper, dark secrets are revealed and Chris transforms from family man to monster.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Blood Money
programme.desc: John joins police on a strange and twisting missing persons case that turns fatal, sending investigators on the trail of Alejandro Castillo; Cal takes on the case of Leticia Smith, a woman on the run from a terrible crime with nothing to lose.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Murder in Monrovia
programme.desc: John and investigators follow the trail of a chilling 911 confession that leads them to dangerous Nimrod Guerrero. And when Frederick McCaskill leaves a survivor clinging to life, police and Cal work to make sure this criminal doesn't elude justice.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: When a sexual predator is discovered hiding in plain sight, John helps police in the pursuit of dangerous James Meece; after a brutal home invasion, Cal goes into the field to help police track down the dangerous James Watts.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Fall From Grace
programme.desc: John joins the hunt for prominent community members Torin and Rena Smith, who absconded from justice after being accused of shocking crimes; Cal pulls back the curtain on Carnell Spencer Lee Jr., a vicious criminal with a dark and menacing past.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Violent Vendetta
programme.desc: A family feud escalates to brutal violence and John joins police in pursuit of Top Ten FBI fugitive Eugene Palmer; Callahan immerses himself in one of the most brutal cases he's ever seen as he helps authorities track down Tamera Williams.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Tragic Entanglement
programme.desc: Luis Frias makes John Walsh's personal most wanted list when Frias allegedly murders his common-law wife in front of their kids. Then, Callahan Walsh explores a bizarre case: Harold 'Butch' Knight leaves clues after confessing to killing his wife.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it's up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice. Then Police break up a domestic dispute and find a body in the bedroom.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: On the night before Halloween, a real-life nightmare unfolds when a young man is found clinging to life. The case takes a dark turn when Lt. Joe Kenda learns there is a second victim somewhere in the woods. Can police rescue him before it's too late?

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco: The Informant
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions, and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: Bugsy Siegel: Godfather of Vegas
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Lucky Luciano
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the US government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: Mafia's Killing Machine: The DeMeo Crew
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate
programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.title: Donnie Brasco: The Informant
programme.desc: Former FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as Donnie Brasco, reveals how his undercover work led to more than 100 convictions, and resulted in the death of underworld figure Dominick 'Sonny Black' Napolitano.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Vessels
programme.desc: This episode ranks the most iconic vessels of warfare of the last century. Featuring the German U-Boat, the Nimitz Aircraft Carriers, and the world's most successful battleship, these vessels have changed the face of warfare.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Hidden Party Zone
programme.desc: Lucas takes on the nearly impossible challenge to transform a tiny, suburban backyard into a luxurious, five-star resort-worthy pool space, hiding its secret identity as the ultimate sports and party fanatic's entertainment zone.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Hook, Line and Sinker

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Roberts
programme.desc: A man and his fiancé would like to see their rustic camping cabin without plumbing transformed into a place they can entertain, use the bathroom indoors and enjoy multiple seasons.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Pool Kings: My Last Pool Was An Iron Tub
programme.desc: A ranch family in Palm Desert, CA, is finally ready to build the desert oasis they've been dreaming of for 20 years. Their backyard paradise includes a complex of waterfalls, a natural boulder spillway, a hidden waterslide, and outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: A young family wants to build a 'refined rustic' staycation paradise in their Austin, Texas backyard. Mike and Jim answer the call by building their dream oasis with waterfalls, LED lights, a swim-up bar and a barbecue cabana as the finishing touch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Natural Fit for a Fun Family
programme.desc: After moving to their forever home, a young family from College Grove, TN, is ready to build their dream pool. The Pool Kings accept the challenge, creating a tropical paradise with a massive waterfall, a swim-up bar and an oversized outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Pool Party Paradise
programme.desc: Tony and Paul help a couple build their dream pool to go along with their newly built outdoor entertaining space. The guys are challenged to design around a giant concrete slab by creating a feature-packed pool that fits with the new space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Rocky Road to Backyard Bliss
programme.desc: A Nashville family is ready for Kyle and Justin to build the perfect pool in their backyard. The project gets off to a rocky start, but the Poll Kings deliver a phenomenal backyard complete with a massive waterfall and beautiful pavilion.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Welcome to Fire Island
programme.desc: A North Carolina family is eager to finally have their first pool. Their expansive backyard allows for an over-the-top, resort-style pool, so the crew take on an extensive build with a 30-foot waterfall, lazy river and a sunken fire pit island.

programme.title: Pool Kings: All the Way Around
programme.desc: Mike and Jim have their work cut out for them when a Palm Springs couple wants to transform their narrow three-sided backyard into a personal resort by adding a grotto, zen area, putting green, oversized spa, and beach entry.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Eyesore to Elegance
programme.desc: After renovating a fixer-upper into their dream home, a couple is ready to add the final touch by restoring the old pool. Paul and Brian Porter create a modern oasis by adding an infinity edge spa, fire bowls and a luxury barbecue area.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Slidin' Into Home
programme.desc: A Texas family returns to their home state of North Carolina and wants to add a pool to their 70-acre property. The kinds design a pool packed with fun features including a custom slide, a waterfall and an outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: It's Tiki Time
programme.desc: The Pool Kings whip up a Tiki-themed, resort-style pool featuring a custom putting green for the entire family to enjoy.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Passport to Greenville
programme.desc: A couple fell in love with the stunning views of Greenville Junction, Maine, but the cabin they purchased is in need of some serious work to make it livable year-round for their extended family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Founded in 1935, Agassiz Village has provided underprivileged and at-risk kids an opportunity to experience camp. Chase and his team take on a big project with a small budget to help the camp with the support of the community.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ship-shape Shack
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full transforming a family's treasured 1950s lobster shack into a cabin that will create a lifetime of memories for generations to come.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Fungal Gourmet: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' this episode from 2000 with new recipes for mushroom stroganoff and pickled mushrooms. Oh, and there's a visit from a certain insect who just so happens to be made of some of the same materials as mushrooms.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Icing Man Cometh

programme.title: Cake Wars: Archie
programme.desc: Four master cake artists battle to have their creations at the centre of a party celebrating 75 years of Archie comics.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: New Orleans
programme.desc: Andrew makes a trip to the Big Easy where the food and the culture are a mix of southern tradition and modern influence.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: The Other Florida
programme.desc: Get away from Florida's big cities and beaches to delve into the interior part of the state where the people and the food have an identity all of their own.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits NYC specifically to scope out Queens' multicultural gastronomy. From hand-ripped noodles to spicy Thai stir-fries, grilled Greek octopus to kosher icons like pastrami on rye.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Francisco
programme.desc: Look no further than San Francisco, California for the best eating on the West Coast. Built on classics like Dungeness Crab Louie and sourdough bread, Andrew Zimmern discovers just what makes the City by the Bay so delectable.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quebec City
programme.desc: Andrew scopes out the creative, rustic comfort dishes of Quebec City, Canada. Influenced by French and English settlers, the city is full of old world charm, late-night diners, hearty food and plenty of maple syrup.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jamaica
programme.desc: In a country celebrated for its colorful culture, Jamaica's heritage-rich food lives up to the hype. Andrew Zimmern explores island icons from jerk chicken and mannish water soup, to curry goat, blue mountain coffee, and gizzadas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing trek across America brings him to Austin, TX. He starts with a 2-pound barbecue behemoth packed with every meat, sauce and side on the menu.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.desc: Eve has posted one of Mike's politically charged vlogs on her Facebook page, but ignores the kids at school when they start giving her a hard time for her views. Vanessa worries that Eve may become an outcast for this.

programme.title: Black-ish: Scarred for Life
programme.desc: The twins opt out of the family Halloween costume for fear it will hurt their social status in middle school. Dre and Bow take it upon themselves to protect them from bullies by putting together the best haunted house and invite the whole seventh grade.

programme.title: Black-ish: Liberal Arts
programme.desc: Dre tearfully drops Zoey off to college for her two-day orientation, and she hits it off with a fellow incoming freshman, Miriam, after they ditch the campus tour. They are smitten upon meeting Aaron, who is running the Black Student Union booth.

programme.title: Burden of Truth: Crisis of Faith
programme.desc: With more potential cases of wrongful child apprehensions, Joanna and Billy investigate Millwood Family Services and discover a potential error in the custody hearing evidence that will change everything in the case and in their lives.

programme.title: In the Dark: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Murphy and Felix swing for the fences when they attempt to execute their plan to end their arrangement with Nia. Dean seeks the help of a former colleague. Max does the unthinkable.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Pilot
programme.desc: Jerry and George finally get the chance to have their pilot produced by the network; Elaine pickets a shop.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Soup Nazi
programme.desc: George's request for extra bread causes the Soup Nazi to ban him from the restaurant.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hey, I Can Pee Outside in the Dark
programme.desc: Jake continuously plays 'Smoke on the Water' on his guitar and has developed a grumpy attitude. Alan tries a father/son chat, Charlie offers a jam session and Berta thinks Jake is just constipated.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tazed in the Lady Nuts
programme.desc: Walden joins his beautiful former employee on a brilliant new project. Meanwhile, Alan advises Jenny to open up to her girlfriend or risk losing her.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Bill/ Murray
programme.desc: As Erica works on her application to Julliard, Adam and Beverly think she needs to do something big to stand out, so they decide to create a music video starring Erica. However, the music video does not go as Adam planned.

programme.title: Mom: Toilet Wine and the Earl of Sandwich

programme.desc: In hopes of spicing up their marriage, Melanie prepares a sexy surprise for Derwin. Meanwhile, Malik decides to clean up his life, but discovers some mistakes can't be fixed.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Williams vs. Keeton

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Family and Funerals/ Slam Dunk
programme.desc: Nephew blames aunt for additional funeral expenses; A camera is damaged on a basketball court.

programme.desc: A man claims a fellow barber bad-mouthed him and stole his clients; a woman claims her late grandmother’s photograph was used without compensation.

programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Phillips vs. Polk
programme.desc: A woman on a revenge mission ends up catching feelings for the man she claims fathered her one-month-old daughter.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Renter's Regret/ Road Rage Went Viral
programme.desc: Disruptive neighbors and unpaid rent; a woman is fired after a road rage video goes viral.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Mom vs. Fiancée
programme.desc: Chris is tired of his mother Myssi and his fiancée Alexis constantly arguing with one another. Alexis believes that Myssi is trying to sabotage their relationship.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A father has had a strained relationship with his adult daughter since he slapped her in the face when she was 16. He’s suing her for the cost of a car towing bill and key. She is countersuing him for a refund for the car.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Not Caring For His Tree ', 'Backing Out ' and ' Conning A Cousin.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Being A Mean Mom' and ' Taking A Guy For A Ride.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: He's Too Heavy, He's My Brother/ Table Top Drunk
programme.desc: Man sues brother for improper training; man sues son for property damage after incident.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A nephew loaned money to his Uncle who refuses to make good on the loan. Then, plaintiff loaned a car to the defendant who made excuses not to pay.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did My Friend Steal My Money While I Was in a Coma?
programme.desc: Joseph called the show because he believes that his friend Chloe stole $900 from him. To make matters worse, he believes she did it while he was hospitalized.

programme.title: Maury: Father's Day DNA ... Please Prove This Is My Baby!
programme.desc: High school sweethearts Jasmine and Karl are hoping to prove to Karl's mother, Wanda, that Karl is the father of Jasmine's child. April needs to prove to her Ian's cousin, Tamika, that he is the father of both of April's children.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: It's Raining Trannies
programme.desc: Get ready for gender-bending action on today's Jerry Springer. Brook is here to finally reveal to her boyfriend that she wasn't born a woman. Plus, Jbaby is here to reveal to his girlfriend Cece that he is really a she.

programme.title: Maury: My Son Married a Cheater, That's Not His Baby!
programme.desc: Weldon is on a mission to make his mother, Kimberly, respect his wife Mandy and accept his son. Weldon is fed up with his mother’s constant name calling and refusing to help out.

programme.title: Movie: Something Borrowed
programme.desc: After a night of drinking, a woman sleeps with her best friend's fiancé and falls in love with him.

programme.title: Movie: The Kitchen
programme.desc: A group of gangsters are locked up and their wives continue the running of their illicit enterprises in 1970s Hell's Kitchen.

programme.title: Movie: La La Land
programme.desc: An aspiring actress meets a poor jazz pianist in Los Angeles and they fall in love. As they both work towards their dreams, they become each other's supports. They begin to have success, but find that the dreams they worked for could tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Jersey Girl
programme.desc: A young father loses his career and his wife and must raise his daughter alone the best way that he can.

programme.title: Movie: Greenberg
programme.desc: A 40-year-old carpenter from New York goes to Los Angeles to house sit for his brother and his family. He develops a relationship with his brother's assistant while she helps him with the house and the family dog.

programme.title: Movie: John Tucker Must Die
programme.desc: A group of girls team up to get revenge on a boy who was sneaking around on all of them.

programme.title: Movie: The Great White Hype
programme.desc: Boxing promoters stage a fight between a black world champion and a white unknown.

programme.title: Movie: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Movie: American Animals
programme.desc: Four university students bored with their quiet suburban lives begin imagining pulling off a heist like they've seen in countless movies, but as their plans to steal rare books from the college's library take shape decide to actually go through with it.

programme.title: Movie: Spanglish
programme.desc: A Hispanic single mother, who recently immigrated to California, must deal with both language and cultural barriers and her daughter's Americanization when she is employed as a housekeeper in a dysfunctional household.

programme.desc: A group of middle-class boys take on tough personas in order to form a rap group.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Leather Gear Is in the Guest Room
programme.desc: Charlie and Alan butt heads over Alan's place in the house, prompting Alan and Jake to move in with Evelyn.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Is There a Mrs. Waffles?
programme.desc: Children's music will never be the same after Charlie becomes an unlikely children's music sensation. When he refuses to perform at a concert, his record promoter threatens to sue him.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Molly Makes Soup
programme.desc: When Vince tries to strike up a friendship with Mike by inviting him to a big basketball game, Molly isn't pleased with their newfound bond.

programme.title: Black-ish: Daddy's Day
programme.desc: After another lackluster Father's Day overshadowed by graduation parties and summer vacations, Dre and his colleagues decide to come up with a holiday initiative entitled 'Daddy's Day,' celebrating everything that Father's Day is not.

programme.title: The Dream Began Here
programme.desc: An exploration of the early days of Washington, D.C. and those who were instrumental in the building of the nation's capital. Also, profiles of influential black employees at the White House.

programme.title: Roads to Freedom
programme.desc: This special reveals some historic sites in the Washington, D.C. area that you may never have heard of, let alone visited. It examines Harper's Ferry where John Brown stuck a dagger in the heart of slavery, and the battlefields of Petersburg, Virginia.

programme.title: Jim Crow: Freedoms Deferred
programme.desc: Despite the Civil War victory that granted slaves their freedom, Jim Crow laws helped maintain a segregated society and severely limited opportunities for Blacks. Learn the evolution of Jim Crow laws and see the people who were impacted by these rulings.

programme.title: Living Black History
programme.desc: This special provides an overview of the National Museum of African American History and Culture Outreach's first year of operation and looks ahead to the new exhibits expected in the future.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Putting Swim Fins on a Cat
programme.desc: Charlie has to find creative ways to entertain his girlfriend's four-year-old son while Alan becomes a human guinea pig.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Help Daddy Find His Toenail
programme.desc: Charlie's girlfriend is embarrassed to be seen with him in public. Meanwhile, Jake sneaks out to a concert despite Alan's forbiddance.

programme.title: Mom: Kitty Litter and a Class a Felony
programme.desc: Christy does damage control when Bonnie acts out after the death of a loved one.

programme.title: Mom: Cheeseburger Salad and Jazz
programme.desc: Christy is concerned with the way Bonnie is processing Alvin's death and tries to get her professional help.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: You Wind Some, You Lose Some
programme.desc: A baseball coach takes one low and painfully inside, a hot air balloonist crashes into a third-floor apartment, and a guy wins a carnival prize but loses his pants.

programme.title: The World's Funniest Weather: It Just Goes to Snow Ya
programme.desc: A weather reporter catches a winter bug by inhaling a fly, a guy shoveling snow off a roof discovers the meaning of slippery slope, and a woman wakes up to a foot and a half of snow inside her car.

programme.title: Wipeout: Wide World of Wipeout
programme.desc: Get ready and watch the competition unfold aboard the 'S.S. Booty Shaker' and the classic 'Big Balls.' The 24 ballsy contestants including 'Beard Braid' and 'Indiana Josh' trek through muck and water along their journey to the rich cash prize.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Through 'Pathway to Victory,' Dr. Robert Jeffress spreads the good news of Jesus Christ to a lost and hurting people, confronts an ungodly culture with God's truth, and equips the saints to apply scripture to their everyday lives.

programme.title: In Search Ministries
programme.desc: Every worldview involves faith in some form; a commitment to applying reason and evidence to our search for ultimate answers to life's big questions.

programme.title: Freethought Matters
programme.desc: A discussion with leading freethought authors, thinkers and activists from around the world.

programme.title: Full Court Press With Greta Van Susteren
programme.desc: A look at the impact of politics and policy on the American people.

programme.title: Elementary: Ears to You
programme.desc: Holmes and Watson consult on a case in which a man suspected of murdering his wife years ago receives a ransom demand for her safe return. Meanwhile, Lestrade overstays his welcome at the brownstone and seems unwilling to leave.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Weird Science
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray move Erica into college where her roommate is also named Erica. Later, Beverly has a hard time letting go and ends up sleeping over in the dorm, much to Erica's dismay.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Hogan Is My Grandfather
programme.desc: Adam is assigned a term paper on a great person in history, and he decides to make a movie about his grandfather but finds all of Pop's war stories mundane. Pops takes matters into his own hands and decides to tell more exciting stories.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Off the Wagon
programme.desc: Corey has a chance to buy an extremely rare Belgium-made 1942 Sarolea motorcycle but Rick is not sure.

programme.title: Full Court Press With Greta Van Susteren
programme.desc: A look at the impact of politics and policy on the American people.

programme.title: Movie: Notting Hill
programme.desc: The press tests the relationship between a Hollywood star and a London shopkeeper.

programme.title: Movie: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: A man's life begins to fall apart as he deals with a divorce and managing his children. After meeting and befriending a young bachelor he learns how to navigate the single life.

programme.title: Movie: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story
programme.desc: A gym owner is at risk of losing his business unless he can come up with $50,000. He and some of his less-than-average clientele enter a dodgeball competition in order to raise the funds and save the gym from his rival.

programme.title: Movie: This Means War
programme.desc: Two CIA agents wage war against each other when they find out they have been dating the same woman.

programme.title: Movie: School of Rock
programme.desc: Kicked out of his rock band, flat broke and lacking any job skills whatsoever, Dewey Finn fakes his way into a job as a substitute teacher at a stuffy private school. Once there, he teaches the kids about rock and roll.

programme.title: Movie: That Thing You Do!
programme.desc: A Pennsylvania rock group in the 1960s has a brief brush with fame.

programme.title: Movie: Shanghai Surprise
programme.desc: A fortune hunter and a missionary combine forces to locate a legendary cache of opium.

programme.title: Movie: Pulling Strings
programme.desc: A U.S. diplomat working in Mexico City is saved after a night of drinking by a local Mariachi singer whose visa she rejected the day before.

programme.title: Movie: John Tucker Must Die
programme.desc: A group of girls team up to get revenge on a boy who was sneaking around on all of them.

programme.title: Movie: The Secret of My Success
programme.desc: Fresh from Kansas with a business degree in hand, young Brantley arrives in New York ready to get rich; though starting in the mailroom wasn't his plan. He impersonates an executive and finds love.

programme.title: Movie: She's the One
programme.desc: Two brothers get mixed up in a tough situation involving one brother's marital infidelity.

programme.title: Movie: Keeping Up With the Steins
programme.desc: As a young boy's bar mitzvah approaches, he invites his estranged grandfather to stay with the family. As a result, the boy learns what it means to be a man.

programme.title: Movie: Good Boys
programme.desc: A young boy is invited to his first kissing party, he asks his best friends to help him get ready, and along the way, they encounter mayhem and mischief.

programme.title: Movie: Yesterday
programme.desc: A man realizes he is the last person on Earth who remembers the Beatles.

programme.title: Movie: I Love You Phillip Morris
programme.desc: When a happily married man realizes that he is gay, he decides to live life to the fullest, which lands him in jail.
